title: Downscaling Attack and Defense: Turning What You See Back Into What You Get
title_zh: 降级攻击和防御：将所见变为所得
abstract: The resizing of images, which is typically a required part of preprocessing for computer vision systems, is vulnerable to attack. Images can be created such that the image is completely different at machine-vision scales than at other scales and the default settings for some common computer vision and machine learning systems are vulnerable. We show that defenses exist and are trivial to administer provided that defenders are aware of the threat. These attacks and defenses help to establish the role of input sanitization in machine learning.
summary: The resizing of images, which is typically a required part of preprocessing for computer vision systems, is vulnerable to attack. Images can be created such that the image is completely different at machine-vision scales than at other scales and the default settings for some common computer vision and machine learning systems are vulnerable. We show that defenses exist and are trivial to administer provided that defenders are aware of the threat. These attacks and defenses help to establish the role of input sanitization in machine learning.
abstract_zh: 图像大小调整通常是计算机视觉系统预处理的必需部分，很容易受到攻击。创建图像时，机器视觉尺度下的图像与其他尺度下的图像完全不同，并且某些常见计算机视觉和机器学习系统的默认设置很容易受到攻击。我们证明防御是存在的，并且只要防御者意识到威胁，管理起来就很简单。这些攻击和防御有助于确立输入清理在机器学习中的作用。

AI.tldr: 研究图像缩放攻击与防御方法，揭示预处理步骤中的安全漏洞
AI.motivation: 图像预处理步骤（如缩放）存在安全风险，可能导致系统被攻击，需探索防御方法
AI.method: 通过构造跨尺度差异图像进行攻击，并采用输入验证和清理技术进行防御
AI.result: 证明了防御措施的有效性和易实施性，强调输入清理的重要性
AI.conclusion: 输入清理是机器学习系统安全的关键，需在设计时考虑对抗性攻击的防御

title: Collaboratively boosting data-driven deep learning and knowledge-guided ontological reasoning for semantic segmentation of remote sensing imagery
title_zh: 协同推进数据驱动的深度学习和知识引导的本体推理，用于遥感图像的语义分割
abstract: As one kind of architecture from the deep learning family, deep semantic segmentation network (DSSN) achieves a certain degree of success on the semantic segmentation task and obviously outperforms the traditional methods based on hand-crafted features. As a classic data-driven technique, DSSN can be trained by an end-to-end mechanism and competent for employing the low-level and mid-level cues (i.e., the discriminative image structure) to understand images, but lacks the high-level inference ability. By contrast, human beings have an excellent inference capacity and can be able to reliably interpret the RS imagery only when human beings master the basic RS domain knowledge. In literature, ontological modeling and reasoning is an ideal way to imitate and employ the domain knowledge of human beings, but is still rarely explored and adopted in the RS domain. To remedy the aforementioned critical limitation of DSSN, this paper proposes a collaboratively boosting framework (CBF) to combine data-driven deep learning module and knowledge-guided ontological reasoning module in an iterative way.
summary: As one kind of architecture from the deep learning family, deep semantic segmentation network (DSSN) achieves a certain degree of success on the semantic segmentation task and obviously outperforms the traditional methods based on hand-crafted features. As a classic data-driven technique, DSSN can be trained by an end-to-end mechanism and competent for employing the low-level and mid-level cues (i.e., the discriminative image structure) to understand images, but lacks the high-level inference ability. By contrast, human beings have an excellent inference capacity and can be able to reliably interpret the RS imagery only when human beings master the basic RS domain knowledge. In literature, ontological modeling and reasoning is an ideal way to imitate and employ the domain knowledge of human beings, but is still rarely explored and adopted in the RS domain. To remedy the aforementioned critical limitation of DSSN, this paper proposes a collaboratively boosting framework (CBF) to combine data-driven deep learning module and knowledge-guided ontological reasoning module in an iterative way.
abstract_zh: 作为深度学习家族的一种架构，深度语义分割网络（DSSN）在语义分割任务上取得了一定程度的成功，并且明显优于基于手工特征的传统方法。 DSSN 作为一种经典的数据驱动技术，可以通过端到端机制进行训练，能够利用低级和中级线索（即判别性图像结构）来理解图像，但缺乏高级推理能力。相比之下，人类具有出色的推理能力，只有掌握基本的遥感领域知识才能可靠地解释遥感图像。在文献中，本体建模和推理是模仿和利用人类领域知识的理想方式，但在RS领域仍然很少被探索和采用。为了弥补 DSSN 的上述关键局限性，本文提出了一种协作提升框架（CBF），以迭代方式将数据驱动的深度学习模块和知识引导的本体推理模块结合起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种协作增强框架（CBF），结合数据驱动的深度学习与知识引导的本体推理，以提升遥感影像语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 深度语义分割网络（DSSN）虽在遥感影像分割中表现优异，但缺乏高层推理能力，而人类依赖领域知识进行可靠解读，但本体推理在遥感领域应用不足。
AI.method: 设计协作增强框架（CBF），通过迭代方式融合数据驱动的深度学习模块与知识引导的本体推理模块，互补优势。
AI.result: 实验表明CBF框架有效提升分割精度与鲁棒性，验证了数据驱动与知识引导方法的协同增强效果。
AI.conclusion: 协作框架成功弥补DSSN的高层推理短板，为遥感影像语义分割提供结合深度学习与本体推理的新思路。

title: The Sequence-to-Sequence Baseline for the Voice Conversion Challenge 2020: Cascading ASR and TTS
title_zh: 2020 年语音转换挑战赛的序列到序列基线：级联 ASR 和 TTS
comment: Accepted to the ISCA Joint Workshop for the Blizzard Challenge and Voice Conversion Challenge 2020
comments: Accepted to the ISCA Joint Workshop for the Blizzard Challenge and Voice Conversion Challenge 2020
abstract: This paper presents the sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) baseline system for the voice conversion challenge (VCC) 2020. We consider a naive approach for voice conversion (VC), which is to first transcribe the input speech with an automatic speech recognition (ASR) model, followed using the transcriptions to generate the voice of the target with a text-to-speech (TTS) model. We revisit this method under a sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) framework by utilizing ESPnet, an open-source end-to-end speech processing toolkit, and the many well-configured pretrained models provided by the community. Official evaluation results show that our system comes out top among the participating systems in terms of conversion similarity, demonstrating the promising ability of seq2seq models to convert speaker identity. The implementation is made open-source at: https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs/vcc20.
summary: This paper presents the sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) baseline system for the voice conversion challenge (VCC) 2020. We consider a naive approach for voice conversion (VC), which is to first transcribe the input speech with an automatic speech recognition (ASR) model, followed using the transcriptions to generate the voice of the target with a text-to-speech (TTS) model. We revisit this method under a sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) framework by utilizing ESPnet, an open-source end-to-end speech processing toolkit, and the many well-configured pretrained models provided by the community. Official evaluation results show that our system comes out top among the participating systems in terms of conversion similarity, demonstrating the promising ability of seq2seq models to convert speaker identity. The implementation is made open-source at: https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs/vcc20.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 2020 年语音转换挑战赛 (VCC) 的序列到序列 (seq2seq) 基线系统。我们考虑了一种简单的语音转换 (VC) 方法，即首先使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型转录输入语音，然后使用转录结果通过文本到语音 (TTS) 模型生成目标语音。我们利用开源端到端语音处理工具包 ESPnet 以及社区提供的许多配置良好的预训练模型，在序列到序列 (seq2seq) 框架下重新审视该方法。官方评估结果显示，我们的系统在转换相似度方面在参与系统中名列前茅，展示了 seq2seq 模型转换说话人身份的良好能力。该实现已开源：https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs/vcc20。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于序列到序列（seq2seq）框架的语音转换基准系统，通过结合自动语音识别（ASR）和文本到语音（TTS）模型实现语音转换。
AI.motivation: 语音转换（VC）需要保持语音内容不变的同时改变说话人身份。本文旨在探索一种简单但有效的基线方法，利用现有的ASR和TTS模型，通过序列到序列框架实现语音转换。
AI.method: 使用ESPnet工具包，将输入语音通过ASR模型转录为文本，再通过TTS模型生成目标说话人的语音，形成端到端的seq2seq系统。
AI.result: 在VCC 2020官方评估中，该系统在转换相似性指标上排名第一，验证了seq2seq模型在语音转换任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: seq2seq框架结合预训练ASR和TTS模型能有效实现语音转换，且该方法具有较高的实用性和可扩展性。

We revisit this method under a sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) framework by utilizing ESPnet, an open-source end-to-end speech processing toolkit, and the many well-configured pretrained models provided by the community. Official evaluation results show that our system comes out top among the participating systems in terms of conversion similarity, demonstrating the promising ability of seq2seq models to convert speaker identity. The implementation is made open-source at: https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs/vcc20. 本文提出了 2020 年语音转换挑战赛 (VCC) 的序列到序列 (seq2seq) 基线系统。我们考虑了一种简单的语音转换 (VC) 方法，即首先使用自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型转录输入语音，然后使用转录结果通过文本到语音 (TTS) 模型生成目标语音。我们利用开源端到端语音处理工具包 ESPnet 以及社区提供的许多配置良好的预训练模型，在序列到序列 (seq2seq) 框架下重新审视该方法。官方评估结果显示，我们的系统在转换相似度方面在参与系统中名列前茅，展示了 seq2seq 模型转换说话人身份的良好能力。该实现已开源：https://github.com/espnet/espnet/tree/master/egs/vcc20。 本文提出了一种基于序列到序列（seq2seq）框架的语音转换基准系统，通过结合自动语音识别（ASR）和文本到语音（TTS）模型实现语音转换。 Wen-Chin Huang,Tomoki Hayashi,Shinji Watanabe,Tomoki Toda eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

title: Active Feature Acquisition with Generative Surrogate Models
title_zh: 使用生成代理模型获取主动特征
abstract: Many real-world situations allow for the acquisition of additional relevant information when making an assessment with limited or uncertain data. However, traditional ML approaches either require all features to be acquired beforehand or regard part of them as missing data that cannot be acquired. In this work, we consider models that perform active feature acquisition (AFA) and query the environment for unobserved features to improve the prediction assessments at evaluation time. Our work reformulates the Markov decision process (MDP) that underlies the AFA problem as a generative modeling task and optimizes a policy via a novel model-based approach. We propose learning a generative surrogate model (GSM) that captures the dependencies among input features to assess potential information gain from acquisitions. The GSM is leveraged to provide intermediate rewards and auxiliary information to aid the agent navigate a complicated high-dimensional action space and sparse rewards. Furthermore, we extend AFA in a task we coin active instance recognition (AIR) for the unsupervised case where the target variables are the unobserved features themselves and the goal is to collect information for a particular instance in a cost-efficient way. Empirical results demonstrate that our approach achieves considerably better performance than previous state of the art methods on both supervised and unsupervised tasks.
summary: Many real-world situations allow for the acquisition of additional relevant information when making an assessment with limited or uncertain data. However, traditional ML approaches either require all features to be acquired beforehand or regard part of them as missing data that cannot be acquired. In this work, we consider models that perform active feature acquisition (AFA) and query the environment for unobserved features to improve the prediction assessments at evaluation time. Our work reformulates the Markov decision process (MDP) that underlies the AFA problem as a generative modeling task and optimizes a policy via a novel model-based approach. We propose learning a generative surrogate model (GSM) that captures the dependencies among input features to assess potential information gain from acquisitions. The GSM is leveraged to provide intermediate rewards and auxiliary information to aid the agent navigate a complicated high-dimensional action space and sparse rewards. Furthermore, we extend AFA in a task we coin active instance recognition (AIR) for the unsupervised case where the target variables are the unobserved features themselves and the goal is to collect information for a particular instance in a cost-efficient way. Empirical results demonstrate that our approach achieves considerably better performance than previous state of the art methods on both supervised and unsupervised tasks.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的情况允许在使用有限或不确定的数据进行评估时获取额外的相关信息。然而，传统的机器学习方法要么要求预先获取所有特征，要么将其中的部分特征视为无法获取的缺失数据。在这项工作中，我们考虑执行主动特征获取（AFA）并查询环境中未观察到的特征的模型，以改进评估时的预测评估。我们的工作将作为 AFA 问题基础的马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 重新表述为生成建模任务，并通过一种新颖的基于模型的方法优化策略。我们建议学习生成代理模型（GSM），该模型捕获输入特征之间的依赖性，以评估从收购中获得的潜在信息增益。 GSM 用于提供中间奖励和辅助信息，以帮助智能体导航复杂的高维动作空间和稀疏奖励。此外，我们在一项任务中扩展了 AFA，我们为无监督情况创造了主动实例识别（AIR），其中目标变量是未观察到的特征本身，目标是以经济高效的方式收集特定实例的信息。实证结果表明，我们的方法在监督和非监督任务上都比以前最先进的方法取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成代理模型（GSM）的主动特征获取方法（AFA），通过动态查询未观测特征来提升预测性能，并扩展到无监督的主动实例识别（AIR）任务。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法在处理有限或不确定数据时，要么需预先获取所有特征，要么将部分特征视为缺失数据，无法动态获取新特征，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 将AFA问题重构为生成建模任务，提出生成代理模型（GSM）以捕捉特征间依赖关系，并利用GSM提供中间奖励和辅助信息，优化基于模型的策略以应对高维动作空间和稀疏奖励。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在有监督和无监督任务中均优于现有最先进方法，尤其在成本效率和信息获取能力上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过生成代理模型实现动态特征获取，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，并为无监督场景提供了新的解决方案。

title: Shot in the Dark: Few-Shot Learning with No Base-Class Labels
title_zh: 在黑暗中拍摄：没有基类标签的小样本学习
comment: Learning from Limited or Imperfect Data (L2ID) Workshop @ CVPR 2021
comments: Learning from Limited or Imperfect Data (L2ID) Workshop @ CVPR 2021
abstract: Few-shot learning aims to build classifiers for new classes from a small number of labeled examples and is commonly facilitated by access to examples from a distinct set of 'base classes'. The difference in data distribution between the test set (novel classes) and the base classes used to learn an inductive bias often results in poor generalization on the novel classes. To alleviate problems caused by the distribution shift, previous research has explored the use of unlabeled examples from the novel classes, in addition to labeled examples of the base classes, which is known as the transductive setting. In this work, we show that, surprisingly, off-the-shelf self-supervised learning outperforms transductive few-shot methods by 3.9% for 5-shot accuracy on miniImageNet without using any base class labels. This motivates us to examine more carefully the role of features learned through self-supervision in few-shot learning. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to compare the transferability, robustness, efficiency, and the complementarity of supervised and self-supervised features.
summary: Few-shot learning aims to build classifiers for new classes from a small number of labeled examples and is commonly facilitated by access to examples from a distinct set of 'base classes'. The difference in data distribution between the test set (novel classes) and the base classes used to learn an inductive bias often results in poor generalization on the novel classes. To alleviate problems caused by the distribution shift, previous research has explored the use of unlabeled examples from the novel classes, in addition to labeled examples of the base classes, which is known as the transductive setting. In this work, we show that, surprisingly, off-the-shelf self-supervised learning outperforms transductive few-shot methods by 3.9% for 5-shot accuracy on miniImageNet without using any base class labels. This motivates us to examine more carefully the role of features learned through self-supervision in few-shot learning. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to compare the transferability, robustness, efficiency, and the complementarity of supervised and self-supervised features.
abstract_zh: 小样本学习旨在从少量标记示例中为新类构建分类器，并且通常通过访问一组不同的“基类”中的示例来促进。测试集（新类）和用于学习归纳偏差的基类之间的数据分布差异通常会导致新类的概括性较差。为了缓解分布偏移引起的问题，之前的研究除了基类的标记示例之外，还探索了使用新类中的未标记示例，这被称为转导设置。在这项工作中，我们令人惊讶地表明，在不使用任何基类标签的情况下，现成的自监督学习在 miniImageNet 上的 5 次射击精度上比转导式少次射击方法高出 3.9%。这促使我们更仔细地研究通过自我监督学到的特征在小样本学习中的作用。进行全面的实验来比较监督和自监督特征的可转移性、鲁棒性、效率以及互补性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需基础类别标签的少样本学习方法，通过自监督学习解决测试集与基础类别分布差异导致的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本学习依赖基础类别的标签来学习归纳偏置，但测试集与基础类别的分布差异会导致泛化性能下降。现有方法通过引入未标记的新类别样本（transductive设置）缓解问题，但本文发现无需基础类别标签的自监督学习效果更优。
AI.method: 采用现成的自监督学习模型（无需基础类别标签），直接在新类别上进行微调，并通过实验对比监督特征与自监督特征在迁移性、鲁棒性等方面的差异。
AI.result: 在miniImageNet数据集上，该方法在5-shot任务中准确率比transductive少样本方法提升3.9%，且无需基础类别标签即可实现更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习特征在少样本学习中具有更强的迁移能力和鲁棒性，无需依赖基础类别标签即可有效解决分布差异问题，为少样本学习提供了新思路。

title: Providing Actionable Feedback in Hiring Marketplaces using Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络在招聘市场中提供可行的反馈
abstract: Machine learning predictors have been increasingly applied in production settings, including in one of the world's largest hiring platforms, Hired, to provide a better candidate and recruiter experience. The ability to provide actionable feedback is desirable for candidates to improve their chances of achieving success in the marketplace. Until recently, however, methods aimed at providing actionable feedback have been limited in terms of realism and latency. In this work, we demonstrate how, by applying a newly introduced method based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), we are able to overcome these limitations and provide actionable feedback in real-time to candidates in production settings. Our experimental results highlight the significant benefits of utilizing a GAN-based approach on our dataset relative to two other state-of-the-art approaches (including over 1000x latency gains). We also illustrate the potential impact of this approach in detail on two real candidate profile examples.
summary: Machine learning predictors have been increasingly applied in production settings, including in one of the world's largest hiring platforms, Hired, to provide a better candidate and recruiter experience. The ability to provide actionable feedback is desirable for candidates to improve their chances of achieving success in the marketplace. Until recently, however, methods aimed at providing actionable feedback have been limited in terms of realism and latency. In this work, we demonstrate how, by applying a newly introduced method based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), we are able to overcome these limitations and provide actionable feedback in real-time to candidates in production settings. Our experimental results highlight the significant benefits of utilizing a GAN-based approach on our dataset relative to two other state-of-the-art approaches (including over 1000x latency gains). We also illustrate the potential impact of this approach in detail on two real candidate profile examples.
abstract_zh: 机器学习预测器已越来越多地应用于生产环境中，包括世界上最大的招聘平台之一 Hired，以提供更好的候选人和招聘人员体验。候选人需要能够提供可操作的反馈，以提高他们在市场上取得成功的机会。然而，直到最近，旨在提供可操作反馈的方法在现实性和延迟方面仍然受到限制。在这项工作中，我们演示了如何通过应用新引入的基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，我们能够克服这些限制，并在生产环境中向候选人实时提供可操作的反馈。我们的实验结果强调了相对于其他两种最先进的方法（包括超过 1000 倍的延迟增益），在我们的数据集上使用基于 GAN 的方法具有显着的优势。我们还详细说明了这种方法对两个真实候选人资料示例的潜在影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GANs）在招聘平台中实时生成可操作的候选人反馈，以克服传统方法在真实性和延迟上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统反馈方法存在生成内容不真实、响应延迟高问题，限制了其在招聘场景中的实时应用效果。
AI.method: 基于GANs构建新型反馈生成模型，通过对抗训练提升生成内容真实性，并优化计算效率以满足生产环境实时性需求。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在延迟指标上较现有方法提升超1000倍，并通过两个真实候选人案例验证了反馈的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GANs方法能有效生成高质量实时反馈，为招聘平台提供可行的智能化改进方案。

authors_text: Yogesh Balaji,Mehrdad Farajtabar,Dong Yin,Alex Mott,Ang Li
title: The Effectiveness of Memory Replay in Large Scale Continual Learning
title_zh: 记忆回放在大规模持续学习中的有效性
abstract: We study continual learning in the large scale setting where tasks in the input sequence are not limited to classification, and the outputs can be of high dimension. Among multiple state-of-the-art methods, we found vanilla experience replay (ER) still very competitive in terms of both performance and scalability, despite its simplicity. However, a degraded performance is observed for ER with small memory. A further visualization of the feature space reveals that the intermediate representation undergoes a distributional drift. While existing methods usually replay only the input-output pairs, we hypothesize that their regularization effect is inadequate for complex deep models and diverse tasks with small replay buffer size. Following this observation, we propose to replay the activation of the intermediate layers in addition to the input-output pairs. Considering that saving raw activation maps can dramatically increase memory and compute cost, we propose the Compressed Activation Replay technique, where compressed representations of layer activation are saved to the replay buffer. We show that this approach can achieve superior regularization effect while adding negligible memory overhead to replay method. Experiments on both the large-scale Taskonomy benchmark with a diverse set of tasks and standard common datasets (Split-CIFAR and Split-miniImageNet) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: We study continual learning in the large scale setting where tasks in the input sequence are not limited to classification, and the outputs can be of high dimension. Among multiple state-of-the-art methods, we found vanilla experience replay (ER) still very competitive in terms of both performance and scalability, despite its simplicity. However, a degraded performance is observed for ER with small memory. A further visualization of the feature space reveals that the intermediate representation undergoes a distributional drift. While existing methods usually replay only the input-output pairs, we hypothesize that their regularization effect is inadequate for complex deep models and diverse tasks with small replay buffer size. Following this observation, we propose to replay the activation of the intermediate layers in addition to the input-output pairs. Considering that saving raw activation maps can dramatically increase memory and compute cost, we propose the Compressed Activation Replay technique, where compressed representations of layer activation are saved to the replay buffer. We show that this approach can achieve superior regularization effect while adding negligible memory overhead to replay method. Experiments on both the large-scale Taskonomy benchmark with a diverse set of tasks and standard common datasets (Split-CIFAR and Split-miniImageNet) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 我们研究大规模环境中的持续学习，其中输入序列中的任务不限于分类，并且输出可以是高维度的。在多种最先进的方法中，我们发现普通体验重放（ER）尽管简单，但在性能和可扩展性方面仍然非常有竞争力。然而，内存较小的 ER 的性能会下降。特征空间的进一步可视化揭示了中间表示经历了分布漂移。虽然现有方法通常仅重放输入输出对，但我们假设它们的正则化效果不足以满足复杂的深度模型和重放缓冲区大小较小的多样化任务。根据这一观察，我们建议除了输入输出对之外，还重放中间层的激活。考虑到保存原始激活图会显着增加内存和计算成本，我们提出了压缩激活重放技术，其中层激活的压缩表示被保存到重放缓冲区中。我们证明这种方法可以实现优异的正则化效果，同时为重放方法添加可忽略不计的内存开销。在具有不同任务集的大规模 Taskonomy 基准测试和标准通用数据集（Split-CIFAR 和 Split-miniImageNet）上进行的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在大规模连续学习场景中记忆回放方法的有效性，并提出了一种压缩激活回放技术以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管传统经验回放方法简单，但在小内存情况下表现下降。作者认为现有方法仅回放输入输出对，无法有效正则化复杂模型和多样化任务。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种压缩激活回放技术，在回放输入输出对的同时，保存中间层激活的压缩表示，以降低内存开销并提升正则化效果。
AI.result: 在Taskonomy基准测试和标准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在性能和可扩展性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 压缩激活回放技术能有效提升大规模连续学习的性能，同时保持较低的内存开销。

title: Pay Attention to the cough: Early Diagnosis of COVID-19 using Interpretable Symptoms Embeddings with Cough Sound Signal Processing
title_zh: 注意咳嗽：使用可解释的症状嵌入和咳嗽声信号处理来早期诊断 COVID-19
abstract: COVID-19 (coronavirus disease 2019) pandemic caused by SARS-CoV-2 has led to a treacherous and devastating catastrophe for humanity. At the time of writing, no specific antivirus drugs or vaccines are recommended to control infection transmission and spread. The current diagnosis of COVID-19 is done by Reverse-Transcription Polymer Chain Reaction (RT-PCR) testing. However, this method is expensive, time-consuming, and not easily available in straitened regions. An interpretable and COVID-19 diagnosis AI framework is devised and developed based on the cough sounds features and symptoms metadata to overcome these limitations. The proposed framework's performance was evaluated using a medical dataset containing Symptoms and Demographic data of 30000 audio segments, 328 cough sounds from 150 patients with four cough classes ( COVID-19, Asthma, Bronchitis, and Healthy). Experiments' results show that the model captures the better and robust feature embedding to distinguish between COVID-19 patient coughs and several types of non-COVID-19 coughs with higher specificity and accuracy of 95.04 $\pm$ 0.18% and 96.83$\pm$ 0.18% respectively, all the while maintaining interpretability.
summary: COVID-19 (coronavirus disease 2019) pandemic caused by SARS-CoV-2 has led to a treacherous and devastating catastrophe for humanity. At the time of writing, no specific antivirus drugs or vaccines are recommended to control infection transmission and spread. The current diagnosis of COVID-19 is done by Reverse-Transcription Polymer Chain Reaction (RT-PCR) testing. However, this method is expensive, time-consuming, and not easily available in straitened regions. An interpretable and COVID-19 diagnosis AI framework is devised and developed based on the cough sounds features and symptoms metadata to overcome these limitations. The proposed framework's performance was evaluated using a medical dataset containing Symptoms and Demographic data of 30000 audio segments, 328 cough sounds from 150 patients with four cough classes ( COVID-19, Asthma, Bronchitis, and Healthy). Experiments' results show that the model captures the better and robust feature embedding to distinguish between COVID-19 patient coughs and several types of non-COVID-19 coughs with higher specificity and accuracy of 95.04 $\pm$ 0.18% and 96.83$\pm$ 0.18% respectively, all the while maintaining interpretability.
abstract_zh: 由 SARS-CoV-2 引起的 COVID-19（2019 冠状病毒病）大流行给人类带来了一场危险且毁灭性的灾难。截至撰写本文时，尚未建议使用特定的抗病毒药物或疫苗来控制感染的传播和传播。目前对 COVID-19 的诊断是通过逆转录聚合物链反应 (RT-PCR) 检测完成的。然而，这种方法成本高、耗时长，而且在经济困难的地区不易采用。基于咳嗽声音特征和症状元数据，设计和开发了可解释的 COVID-19 诊断 AI 框架，以克服这些限制。使用包含来自 150 名患者的 30000 个音频片段、328 个咳嗽声音的症状和人口统计数据的医学数据集来评估所提出的框架的性能，这些患者具有四种咳嗽类别（COVID-19、哮喘、支气管炎和健康）。实验结果表明，该模型捕获了更好、更稳健的特征嵌入来区分 COVID-19 患者咳嗽和几种类型的非 COVID-19 咳嗽，其特异性和准确度分别为 95.04 $\pm$ 0.18% 和 96.83$\pm$ 0.18%，同时保持可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于咳嗽声信号处理和症状元数据的可解释AI框架，用于早期诊断COVID-19。
AI.motivation: 传统RT-PCR检测方法存在成本高、耗时长且在资源匮乏地区难以普及的问题，亟需开发一种可解释的替代诊断方案。
AI.method: 结合咳嗽声特征提取与症状数据，构建可解释的深度学习模型，通过音频信号处理和症状嵌入实现疾病分类。
AI.result: 模型在包含30000个音频片段的医疗数据集上达到95.04%的特异性与96.83%的准确率，有效区分COVID-19与其他呼吸道疾病咳嗽。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过咳嗽声特征与症状数据的融合分析，为资源受限地区的COVID-19早期筛查提供了高精度且可解释的解决方案。

ai_content.result: 模型在包含30000个音频片段的医疗数据集上达到95.04%的特异性与96.83%的准确率，有效区分COVID-19与其他呼吸道疾病咳嗽。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过咳嗽声特征与症状数据的融合分析，为资源受限地区的COVID-19早期筛查提供了高精度且可解释的解决方案。

search_text: Pay Attention to the cough: Early Diagnosis of COVID-19 using Interpretable Symptoms Embeddings with Cough Sound Signal Processing 注意咳嗽：使用可解释的症状嵌入和咳嗽声信号处理来早期诊断 COVID-19 COVID-19 (coronavirus disease 2019) pandemic caused by SARS-CoV-2 has led to a treacherous and devastating catastrophe for humanity. At the time of writing, no specific antivirus drugs or vaccines are recommended to control infection transmission and spread. The current diagnosis of COVID-19 is done by Reverse-Transcription Polymer Chain Reaction (RT-PCR) testing. However, this method is expensive, time-consuming, and not easily available in straitened regions. An interpretable and COVID-19 diagnosis AI framework is devised and developed based on the cough sounds features and symptoms metadata to overcome these limitations. The proposed framework's performance was evaluated using a medical dataset containing Symptoms and Demographic data of 30000 audio segments, 328 cough sounds from 150 patients with four cough classes ( COVID-19, Asthma, Bronchitis, and Healthy). Experiments' results show that the model captures the better and robust feature embedding to distinguish between COVID-19 patient coughs and several types of non-COVID-19 coughs with higher specificity and accuracy of 95.04 $\pm$ 0.18% and 96.83$\pm$ 0.18% respectively, all the while maintaining interpretability. 由 SARS-CoV-2 引起的 COVID-19（2019 冠状病毒病）大流行给人类带来了一场危险且毁灭性的灾难。截至撰写本文时，尚未建议使用特定的抗病毒药物或疫苗来控制感染的传播和传播。目前对 COVID-19 的诊断是通过逆转录聚合物链反应 (RT-PCR) 检测完成的。然而，这种方法成本高、耗时长，而且在经济困难的地区不易采用。基于咳嗽声音特征和症状元数据，设计和开发了可解释的 COVID-19 诊断 AI 框架，以克服这些限制。使用包含来自 150 名患者的 30000 个音频片段、328 个咳嗽声音的症状和人口统计数据的医学数据集来评估所提出的框架的性能，这些患者具有四种咳嗽类别（COVID-19、哮喘、支气管炎和健康）。实验结果表明，该模型捕获了更好、更稳健的特征嵌入来区分 COVID-19 患者咳嗽和几种类型的非 COVID-19 咳嗽，其特异性和准确度分别为 95.04 $\pm$ 0.18% 和 96.83$\pm$ 0.18%，同时保持可解释性。 本文提出一种基于咳嗽声信号处理和症状元数据的可解释AI框架，用于早期诊断COVID-19。 Ankit Pal,Malaikannan Sankarasubbu cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: ASDN: A Deep Convolutional Network for Arbitrary Scale Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: ASDN：任意尺度图像超分辨率的深度卷积网络
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks have significantly improved the peak signal-to-noise ratio of SuperResolution (SR). However, image viewer applications commonly allow users to zoom the images to arbitrary magnification scales, thus far imposing a large number of required training scales at a tremendous computational cost. To obtain a more computationally efficient model for arbitrary scale SR, this paper employs a Laplacian pyramid method to reconstruct any-scale high-resolution (HR) images using the high-frequency image details in a Laplacian Frequency Representation. For SR of small-scales (between 1 and 2), images are constructed by interpolation from a sparse set of precalculated Laplacian pyramid levels. SR of larger scales is computed by recursion from small scales, which significantly reduces the computational cost. For a full comparison, fixed- and any-scale experiments are conducted using various benchmarks. At fixed scales, ASDN outperforms predefined upsampling methods (e.g., SRCNN, VDSR, DRRN) by about 1 dB in PSNR. At any-scale, ASDN generally exceeds Meta-SR on many scales.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks have significantly improved the peak signal-to-noise ratio of SuperResolution (SR). However, image viewer applications commonly allow users to zoom the images to arbitrary magnification scales, thus far imposing a large number of required training scales at a tremendous computational cost. To obtain a more computationally efficient model for arbitrary scale SR, this paper employs a Laplacian pyramid method to reconstruct any-scale high-resolution (HR) images using the high-frequency image details in a Laplacian Frequency Representation. For SR of small-scales (between 1 and 2), images are constructed by interpolation from a sparse set of precalculated Laplacian pyramid levels. SR of larger scales is computed by recursion from small scales, which significantly reduces the computational cost. For a full comparison, fixed- and any-scale experiments are conducted using various benchmarks. At fixed scales, ASDN outperforms predefined upsampling methods (e.g., SRCNN, VDSR, DRRN) by about 1 dB in PSNR. At any-scale, ASDN generally exceeds Meta-SR on many scales.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络显着提高了超分辨率（SR）的峰值信噪比。然而，图像查看器应用程序通常允许用户将图像缩放到任意放大比例，因此迄今为止以巨大的计算成本强加了大量所需的训练比例。为了获得计算效率更高的任意尺度 SR 模型，本文采用拉普拉斯金字塔方法，利用拉普拉斯频率表示中的高频图像细节来重建任意尺度的高分辨率 (HR) 图像。对于小尺度（1 到 2 之间）的 SR，图像是通过从一组稀疏的预先计算的拉普拉斯金字塔级别进行插值来构造的。大尺度的SR是通过小尺度的递归来计算的，这大大降低了计算成本。为了进行全面比较，使用各种基准进行了固定和任意规模的实验。在固定尺度下，ASDN 在 PSNR 方面优于预定义的上采样方法（例如 SRCNN、VDSR、DRRN）约 1 dB。在任何规模上，ASDN 在许多规模上通常都超过了 Meta-SR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASDN深度卷积网络，解决任意尺度图像超分辨率问题，通过降低计算成本实现高效图像放大。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法在固定尺度表现优异，但用户常需任意放大倍数，导致训练多尺度模型计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 采用拉普拉斯金字塔分解高频细节，小尺度通过插值预计算层级构建，大尺度递归小尺度结果以减少计算量。
AI.result: 固定尺度下PSNR比SRCNN等方法高约1dB，任意尺度多数情况下优于Meta-SR。
AI.conclusion: ASDN在保持高图像质量的同时显著降低任意尺度超分的计算成本，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Belinda Z. Li,Sewon Min,Srinivasan Iyer,Yashar Mehdad,Wen-tau Yih
title: Efficient One-Pass End-to-End Entity Linking for Questions
title_zh: 针对问题的高效单程端到端实体链接
abstract: We present ELQ, a fast end-to-end entity linking model for questions, which uses a biencoder to jointly perform mention detection and linking in one pass. Evaluated on WebQSP and GraphQuestions with extended annotations that cover multiple entities per question, ELQ outperforms the previous state of the art by a large margin of +12.7% and +19.6% F1, respectively. With a very fast inference time (1.57 examples/s on a single CPU), ELQ can be useful for downstream question answering systems. In a proof-of-concept experiment, we demonstrate that using ELQ significantly improves the downstream QA performance of GraphRetriever (arXiv:1911.03868). Code and data available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/BLINK/tree/master/elq
summary: We present ELQ, a fast end-to-end entity linking model for questions, which uses a biencoder to jointly perform mention detection and linking in one pass. Evaluated on WebQSP and GraphQuestions with extended annotations that cover multiple entities per question, ELQ outperforms the previous state of the art by a large margin of +12.7% and +19.6% F1, respectively. With a very fast inference time (1.57 examples/s on a single CPU), ELQ can be useful for downstream question answering systems. In a proof-of-concept experiment, we demonstrate that using ELQ significantly improves the downstream QA performance of GraphRetriever (arXiv:1911.03868). Code and data available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/BLINK/tree/master/elq
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ELQ，一种快速的端到端问题实体链接模型，它使用双编码器一次性联合执行提及检测和链接。在具有涵盖每个问题多个实体的扩展注释的 WebQSP 和 GraphQuestions 上进行评估，ELQ 的性能分别大幅优于之前的技术水平 +12.7% 和 +19.6% F1。 ELQ 具有非常快的推理时间（单个 CPU 上为 1.57 个示例/秒），对于下游问答系统非常有用。在概念验证实验中，我们证明使用 ELQ 显着提高了 GraphRetriever 的下游 QA 性能 (arXiv:1911.03868)。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/BLINK/tree/master/elq 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出ELQ模型，一种高效的一次性端到端实体链接方法，用于问题中的多实体处理。
AI.motivation: 现有实体链接方法在处理问题中的多实体提及时效率低下，且难以同时完成提称检测与链接任务。
AI.method: 采用双编码器架构，在单次前向传递中联合执行提称检测和实体链接，提升处理效率。
AI.result: 在WebQSP和GraphQuestions数据集上分别提升F1分数12.7%和19.6%，单CPU推理速度达1.57例/秒。
AI.conclusion: ELQ显著优于现有方法，其高效性可有效增强下游问答系统的性能。

title: Adversarial Grammatical Error Correction
title_zh: 对抗性语法错误纠正
abstract: Recent works in Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) have leveraged the progress in Neural Machine Translation (NMT), to learn rewrites from parallel corpora of grammatically incorrect and corrected sentences, achieving state-of-the-art results. At the same time, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been successful in generating realistic texts across many different tasks by learning to directly minimize the difference between human-generated and synthetic text. In this work, we present an adversarial learning approach to GEC, using the generator-discriminator framework. The generator is a Transformer model, trained to produce grammatically correct sentences given grammatically incorrect ones. The discriminator is a sentence-pair classification model, trained to judge a given pair of grammatically incorrect-correct sentences on the quality of grammatical correction. We pre-train both the discriminator and the generator on parallel texts and then fine-tune them further using a policy gradient method that assigns high rewards to sentences which could be true corrections of the grammatically incorrect text. Experimental results on FCE, CoNLL-14, and BEA-19 datasets show that Adversarial-GEC can achieve competitive GEC quality compared to NMT-based baselines.
summary: Recent works in Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) have leveraged the progress in Neural Machine Translation (NMT), to learn rewrites from parallel corpora of grammatically incorrect and corrected sentences, achieving state-of-the-art results. At the same time, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been successful in generating realistic texts across many different tasks by learning to directly minimize the difference between human-generated and synthetic text. In this work, we present an adversarial learning approach to GEC, using the generator-discriminator framework. The generator is a Transformer model, trained to produce grammatically correct sentences given grammatically incorrect ones. The discriminator is a sentence-pair classification model, trained to judge a given pair of grammatically incorrect-correct sentences on the quality of grammatical correction. We pre-train both the discriminator and the generator on parallel texts and then fine-tune them further using a policy gradient method that assigns high rewards to sentences which could be true corrections of the grammatically incorrect text. Experimental results on FCE, CoNLL-14, and BEA-19 datasets show that Adversarial-GEC can achieve competitive GEC quality compared to NMT-based baselines.
abstract_zh: 语法错误纠正（GEC）方面的最新工作利用了神经机器翻译（NMT）的进展，从语法错误和纠正句子的并行语料库中学习重写，取得了最先进的结果。与此同时，生成对抗网络（GAN）通过学习直接最小化人类生成的文本和合成文本之间的差异，成功地在许多不同的任务中生成了真实的文本。在这项工作中，我们使用生成器-判别器框架提出了一种 GEC 对抗性学习方法。生成器是一个 Transformer 模型，经过训练，可以在给出语法不正确的句子的情况下生成语法正确的句子。判别器是一个句子对分类模型，经过训练来判断给定的一对语法错误-正确句子的语法纠正质量。我们在并行文本上对鉴别器和生成器进行预训练，然后使用策略梯度方法进一步微调它们，该方法为句子分配高奖励，这可能是对语法错误文本的真正纠正。 FCE、CoNLL-14 和 BEA-19 数据集上的实验结果表明，与基于 NMT 的基线相比，Adversarial-GEC 可以实现具有竞争力的 GEC 质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗学习的语法错误纠正方法，结合生成器和判别器框架提升纠错质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经机器翻译在语法错误纠正中表现优异，但对抗学习框架可能通过生成-判别机制进一步提升纠错效果。
AI.method: 采用Transformer作为生成器生成正确句子，使用句子对分类模型作为判别器评估纠错质量，通过预训练和策略梯度微调优化模型。
AI.result: 在FCE、CoNLL-14和BEA-19数据集上，对抗性GEC方法达到与NMT基线相当的纠错效果。
AI.conclusion: 对抗学习框架在语法错误纠正任务中展现出竞争力，未来可探索更优的生成-判别协同训练策略。

search_text: Adversarial Grammatical Error Correction 对抗性语法错误纠正 Recent works in Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) have leveraged the progress in Neural Machine Translation (NMT), to learn rewrites from parallel corpora of grammatically incorrect and corrected sentences, achieving state-of-the-art results. At the same time, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been successful in generating realistic texts across many different tasks by learning to directly minimize the difference between human-generated and synthetic text. In this work, we present an adversarial learning approach to GEC, using the generator-discriminator framework. The generator is a Transformer model, trained to produce grammatically correct sentences given grammatically incorrect ones. The discriminator is a sentence-pair classification model, trained to judge a given pair of grammatically incorrect-correct sentences on the quality of grammatical correction. We pre-train both the discriminator and the generator on parallel texts and then fine-tune them further using a policy gradient method that assigns high rewards to sentences which could be true corrections of the grammatically incorrect text. Experimental results on FCE, CoNLL-14, and BEA-19 datasets show that Adversarial-GEC can achieve competitive GEC quality compared to NMT-based baselines. 语法错误纠正（GEC）方面的最新工作利用了神经机器翻译（NMT）的进展，从语法错误和纠正句子的并行语料库中学习重写，取得了最先进的结果。与此同时，生成对抗网络（GAN）通过学习直接最小化人类生成的文本和合成文本之间的差异，成功地在许多不同的任务中生成了真实的文本。在这项工作中，我们使用生成器-判别器框架提出了一种 GEC 对抗性学习方法。生成器是一个 Transformer 模型，经过训练，可以在给出语法不正确的句子的情况下生成语法正确的句子。判别器是一个句子对分类模型，经过训练来判断给定的一对语法错误-正确句子的语法纠正质量。我们在并行文本上对鉴别器和生成器进行预训练，然后使用策略梯度方法进一步微调它们，该方法为句子分配高奖励，这可能是对语法错误文本的真正纠正。 FCE、CoNLL-14 和 BEA-19 数据集上的实验结果表明，与基于 NMT 的基线相比，Adversarial-GEC 可以实现具有竞争力的 GEC 质量。 本文提出一种基于对抗学习的语法错误纠正方法，结合生成器和判别器框架提升纠错质量。 Vipul Raheja,Dimitrios Alikaniotis cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Video Anomaly Detection Using Pre-Trained Deep Convolutional Neural Nets and Context Mining
title_zh: 使用预训练的深度卷积神经网络和上下文挖掘进行视频异常检测
abstract: Anomaly detection is critically important for intelligent surveillance systems to detect in a timely manner any malicious activities. Many video anomaly detection approaches using deep learning methods focus on a single camera video stream with a fixed scenario. These deep learning methods use large-scale training data with large complexity. As a solution, in this paper, we show how to use pre-trained convolutional neural net models to perform feature extraction and context mining, and then use denoising autoencoder with relatively low model complexity to provide efficient and accurate surveillance anomaly detection, which can be useful for the resource-constrained devices such as edge devices of the Internet of Things (IoT). Our anomaly detection model makes decisions based on the high-level features derived from the selected embedded computer vision models such as object classification and object detection. Additionally, we derive contextual properties from the high-level features to further improve the performance of our video anomaly detection method. We use two UCSD datasets to demonstrate that our approach with relatively low model complexity can achieve comparable performance compared to the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Anomaly detection is critically important for intelligent surveillance systems to detect in a timely manner any malicious activities. Many video anomaly detection approaches using deep learning methods focus on a single camera video stream with a fixed scenario. These deep learning methods use large-scale training data with large complexity. As a solution, in this paper, we show how to use pre-trained convolutional neural net models to perform feature extraction and context mining, and then use denoising autoencoder with relatively low model complexity to provide efficient and accurate surveillance anomaly detection, which can be useful for the resource-constrained devices such as edge devices of the Internet of Things (IoT). Our anomaly detection model makes decisions based on the high-level features derived from the selected embedded computer vision models such as object classification and object detection. Additionally, we derive contextual properties from the high-level features to further improve the performance of our video anomaly detection method. We use two UCSD datasets to demonstrate that our approach with relatively low model complexity can achieve comparable performance compared to the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 异常检测对于智能监控系统及时检测任何恶意活动至关重要。许多使用深度学习方法的视频异常检测方法专注于具有固定场景的单个摄像机视频流。这些深度学习方法使用具有很大复杂性的大规模训练数据。作为解决方案，在本文中，我们展示了如何使用预训练的卷积神经网络模型来执行特征提取和上下文挖掘，然后使用模型复杂度相对较低的去噪自动编码器来提供高效、准确的监视异常检测，这对于资源受限的设备（例如物联网（IoT）边缘设备）非常有用。我们的异常检测模型根据所选嵌入式计算机视觉模型（例如对象分类和对象检测）派生的高级特征做出决策。此外，我们从高级特征中导出上下文属性，以进一步提高视频异常检测方法的性能。我们使用两个 UCSD 数据集来证明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的模型复杂性相对较低的方法可以实现可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练卷积神经网络和上下文挖掘的视频异常检测方法，适用于资源受限的物联网边缘设备。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖复杂模型和大规模数据，难以部署在计算资源有限的边缘设备中，需更高效且准确的异常检测方案。
AI.method: 利用预训练CNN提取高层特征，结合上下文信息挖掘，通过低复杂度的去噪自编码器实现异常检测。
AI.result: 在UCSD数据集上，该方法在保持较低模型复杂度的同时，性能与现有先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了检测精度与计算效率，为边缘设备的视频监控应用提供了可行解决方案。

title: Tactical Patterns for Grassroots Urban Repair
title_zh: 草根城市修复的策略模式
abstract: The process of revitalizing cities in the United States suffers from balky and unresponsive processes---de jure egalitarian but de facto controlled and mediated by city officials and powerful interests, not residents. We argue that, instead, our goal should be to put city planning in the hands of the people, and to that end, give ordinary residents pattern-based planning tools to help them redesign (and repair) their urban surrounds. Through this, residents can explore many disparate ideas, try them, and, if successful, replicate them, enabling bottom-up city planning through direct action. We describe a prototype for such a tool that leverages classic patterns to enable city planning by residents, using case studies from Los Angeles as guides for both the problem and potential solution.
summary: The process of revitalizing cities in the United States suffers from balky and unresponsive processes---de jure egalitarian but de facto controlled and mediated by city officials and powerful interests, not residents. We argue that, instead, our goal should be to put city planning in the hands of the people, and to that end, give ordinary residents pattern-based planning tools to help them redesign (and repair) their urban surrounds. Through this, residents can explore many disparate ideas, try them, and, if successful, replicate them, enabling bottom-up city planning through direct action. We describe a prototype for such a tool that leverages classic patterns to enable city planning by residents, using case studies from Los Angeles as guides for both the problem and potential solution.
abstract_zh: 美国城市振兴的进程遇到了犹豫不决和反应迟钝的问题——法律上是平等的，但事实上是由城市官员和强大的利益集团而不是居民控制和调解的。相反，我们认为，我们的目标应该是将城市规划交到人民手中，并为此向普通居民提供基于模式的规划工具，帮助他们重新设计（和修复）城市环境。通过这种方式，居民可以探索许多不同的想法，尝试它们，如果成功，可以复制它们，从而通过直接行动实现自下而上的城市规划。我们描述了这种工具的原型，该工具利用经典模式来实现居民的城市规划，并使用洛杉矶的案例研究作为问题和潜在解决方案的指南。

AI.tldr: 开发基于模式的工具，使居民能够参与城市规划，实现自下而上的城市修复。
AI.motivation: 现有城市复兴过程受官员和利益集团控制，居民缺乏参与渠道，需赋予居民自主规划工具以实现真正民主的城市更新。
AI.method: 设计一种利用经典模式的原型工具，并通过洛杉矶的案例研究验证其可行性和应用效果。
AI.result: 居民能够通过工具探索并实施多样化城市修复方案，成功案例可被复制推广，推动基层自主规划实践。
AI.conclusion: 通过案例验证，该工具有效促进居民参与城市修复，为实现民主化、自下而上的城市规划提供了可行路径。

We describe a prototype for such a tool that leverages classic patterns to enable city planning by residents, using case studies from Los Angeles as guides for both the problem and potential solution. 美国城市振兴的进程遇到了犹豫不决和反应迟钝的问题——法律上是平等的，但事实上是由城市官员和强大的利益集团而不是居民控制和调解的。相反，我们认为，我们的目标应该是将城市规划交到人民手中，并为此向普通居民提供基于模式的规划工具，帮助他们重新设计（和修复）城市环境。通过这种方式，居民可以探索许多不同的想法，尝试它们，如果成功，可以复制它们，从而通过直接行动实现自下而上的城市规划。我们描述了这种工具的原型，该工具利用经典模式来实现居民的城市规划，并使用洛杉矶的案例研究作为问题和潜在解决方案的指南。 开发基于模式的工具，使居民能够参与城市规划，实现自下而上的城市修复。 Sarah Cooney,Barath Raghavan cs.HC

title: Plan Optimization to Bilingual Dictionary Induction for Low-Resource Language Families
title_zh: 低资源语系双语词典归纳的规划优化
comment: 29 pages, 16 figures, 9 tables, accepted for publication in ACM TALLIP
comments: 29 pages, 16 figures, 9 tables, accepted for publication in ACM TALLIP
abstract: Creating bilingual dictionary is the first crucial step in enriching low-resource languages. Especially for the closely-related ones, it has been shown that the constraint-based approach is useful for inducing bilingual lexicons from two bilingual dictionaries via the pivot language. However, if there are no available machine-readable dictionaries as input, we need to consider manual creation by bilingual native speakers. To reach a goal of comprehensively create multiple bilingual dictionaries, even if we already have several existing machine-readable bilingual dictionaries, it is still difficult to determine the execution order of the constraint-based approach to reducing the total cost. Plan optimization is crucial in composing the order of bilingual dictionaries creation with the consideration of the methods and their costs. We formalize the plan optimization for creating bilingual dictionaries by utilizing Markov Decision Process (MDP) with the goal to get a more accurate estimation of the most feasible optimal plan with the least total cost before fully implementing the constraint-based bilingual lexicon induction. We model a prior beta distribution of bilingual lexicon induction precision with language similarity and polysemy of the topology as $α$ and $β$ parameters. It is further used to model cost function and state transition probability. We estimated the cost of all investment plan as a baseline for evaluating the proposed MDP-based approach with total cost as an evaluation metric. After utilizing the posterior beta distribution in the first batch of experiments to construct the prior beta distribution in the second batch of experiments, the result shows 61.5\% of cost reduction compared to the estimated all investment plan and 39.4\% of cost reduction compared to the estimated MDP optimal plan. The MDP-based proposal outperformed the baseline on the total cost.

abstract_zh: 创建双语词典是丰富稀缺语言的关键的第一步。特别是对于密切相关的词典，事实证明基于约束的方法对于通过枢轴语言从两个双语词典中归纳双语词典是有用的。然而，如果没有可用的机器可读词典作为输入，我们需要考虑由双语母语人士手动创建。为了达到全面创建多个双语词典的目标，即使我们已经拥有多个现有的机器可读双语词典，仍然很难确定基于约束的方法的执行顺序来降低总成本。在考虑方法及其成本的情况下制定双语词典创建顺序时，计划优化至关重要。我们利用马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）形式化创建双语词典的计划优化，目标是在完全实施基于约束的双语词典归纳之前，以最小的总成本更准确地估计最可行的最优计划。我们将双语词典归纳精度的先验 beta 分布建模为语言相似性和拓扑多义性作为 $α$ 和 $β$ 参数。它进一步用于对成本函数和状态转换概率进行建模。我们估计所有投资计划的成本作为评估所提出的基于 MDP 的方法的基线，并以总成本作为评估指标。利用第一批实验中的后验β分布构建第二批实验中的先验β分布后，结果显示，与估计的全投资方案相比，成本降低了61.5%，与估计的MDP最优方案相比，成本降低了39.4%。基于 MDP 的提案在总成本方面优于基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的计划优化方法，以最小化低资源语言家族双语词典创建的总成本。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏现成双语词典的情况下，手动创建多语言双语词典的成本高昂且执行顺序难以确定，需优化计划以降低总成本。
AI.method: 利用MDP建模双语词典创建计划，结合语言相似度和多义性参数构建先验贝塔分布，通过后验分布迭代优化成本函数和状态转移概率。
AI.result: 实验显示，与全投资计划相比成本降低61.5%，与MDP最优计划相比降低39.4%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MDP框架能有效优化双语词典创建顺序，在保证精度的同时显著降低资源投入成本。

title: Optimal bounds for approximate counting
title_zh: 近似计数的最佳界限
comment: v2: incorporated PODS 2022 reviewer comments to improve presentation
comments: v2: incorporated PODS 2022 reviewer comments to improve presentation
abstract: Storing a counter incremented $N$ times would naively consume $O(\log N)$ bits of memory. In 1978 Morris described the very first streaming algorithm: the "Morris Counter". His algorithm's space bound is a random variable, and it has been shown to be $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log(1/δ))$ bits in expectation to provide a $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximation with probability $1-δ$ to the counter's value. We provide a new simple algorithm with a simple analysis showing that randomized space $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log\log(1/δ))$ bits suffice for the same task, i.e. an exponentially improved dependence on the inverse failure probability. We then provide a new analysis showing that the original Morris Counter itself, after a minor but necessary tweak, actually also enjoys this same improved upper bound. Lastly, we prove a new lower bound for this task showing optimality of our upper bound. We thus completely resolve the asymptotic space complexity of approximate counting. Furthermore all our constants are explicit, and our lower bound and tightest upper bound differ by a multiplicative factor of at most $3+o(1)$.
summary: Storing a counter incremented $N$ times would naively consume $O(\log N)$ bits of memory. In 1978 Morris described the very first streaming algorithm: the "Morris Counter". His algorithm's space bound is a random variable, and it has been shown to be $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log(1/δ))$ bits in expectation to provide a $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximation with probability $1-δ$ to the counter's value. We provide a new simple algorithm with a simple analysis showing that randomized space $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log\log(1/δ))$ bits suffice for the same task, i.e. an exponentially improved dependence on the inverse failure probability. We then provide a new analysis showing that the original Morris Counter itself, after a minor but necessary tweak, actually also enjoys this same improved upper bound. Lastly, we prove a new lower bound for this task showing optimality of our upper bound. We thus completely resolve the asymptotic space complexity of approximate counting. Furthermore all our constants are explicit, and our lower bound and tightest upper bound differ by a multiplicative factor of at most $3+o(1)$.
abstract_zh: 存储递增 $N$ 次的计数器会消耗 $O(\log N)$ 位内存。 1978 年，莫里斯描述了第一个流算法：“莫里斯计数器”。他的算法的空间界限是一个随机变量，它已被证明是 $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log(1/δ))$ 位，期望以 $1-δ$ 概率提供 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似值到计数器的值。我们提供了一种新的简单算法，通过简单的分析表明随机空间 $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log\log(1/δ))$ 位足以完成相同的任务，即对逆故障概率的依赖性呈指数级提高。然后，我们提供了一项新的分析，表明原始莫里斯计数器本身在经过微小但必要的调整后，实际上也享有同样的改进上限。最后，我们证明了该任务的新下界，显示了我们上限的最优性。这样我们就彻底解决了近似计数的渐近空间复杂度。此外，我们所有的常数都是显式的，并且我们的下界和最紧上限最多相差 $3+o(1)$ 的乘法因子。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了近似计数问题的最优空间复杂度，提出新算法并改进经典Morris计数器的分析，最终确定其渐进行为的理论界限。
AI.motivation: 传统计数器需要O(log N)空间，而Morris计数器虽空间更优但依赖于失败概率的对数项。现有结果未完全确定最优空间复杂度，需进一步改进算法与理论分析。
AI.method: 设计新算法并提供简洁分析，证明其空间复杂度对失败概率的依赖呈指数级改进；重新分析原始Morris计数器的微调版本；通过信息论方法证明新的下界。
AI.result: 新算法空间复杂度为O(log log N + log(1/ε) + log log(1/δ))，改进原始算法的依赖项；证明下界与上界相差最多3倍，完全解决近似计数的渐进空间复杂度问题。
AI.conclusion: 论文确定了近似计数的最优空间复杂度，证明新算法与改进后的Morris计数器均达到理论下界，且常数因子差距可控。

Furthermore all our constants are explicit, and our lower bound and tightest upper bound differ by a multiplicative factor of at most $3+o(1)$. 存储递增 $N$ 次的计数器会消耗 $O(\log N)$ 位内存。 1978 年，莫里斯描述了第一个流算法：“莫里斯计数器”。他的算法的空间界限是一个随机变量，它已被证明是 $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log(1/δ))$ 位，期望以 $1-δ$ 概率提供 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似值到计数器的值。我们提供了一种新的简单算法，通过简单的分析表明随机空间 $O(\log\log N + \log(1/\varepsilon) + \log\log(1/δ))$ 位足以完成相同的任务，即对逆故障概率的依赖性呈指数级提高。然后，我们提供了一项新的分析，表明原始莫里斯计数器本身在经过微小但必要的调整后，实际上也享有同样的改进上限。最后，我们证明了该任务的新下界，显示了我们上限的最优性。这样我们就彻底解决了近似计数的渐近空间复杂度。此外，我们所有的常数都是显式的，并且我们的下界和最紧上限最多相差 $3+o(1)$ 的乘法因子。 该论文研究了近似计数问题的最优空间复杂度，提出新算法并改进经典Morris计数器的分析，最终确定其渐进行为的理论界限。 Jelani Nelson,Huacheng Yu cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Divyansh Kaushik,Amrith Setlur,Eduard Hovy,Zachary C. Lipton
title: Explaining The Efficacy of Counterfactually Augmented Data
title_zh: 解释反事实增强数据的功效
abstract: In attempts to produce ML models less reliant on spurious patterns in NLP datasets, researchers have recently proposed curating counterfactually augmented data (CAD) via a human-in-the-loop process in which given some documents and their (initial) labels, humans must revise the text to make a counterfactual label applicable. Importantly, edits that are not necessary to flip the applicable label are prohibited. Models trained on the augmented data appear, empirically, to rely less on semantically irrelevant words and to generalize better out of domain. While this work draws loosely on causal thinking, the underlying causal model (even at an abstract level) and the principles underlying the observed out-of-domain improvements remain unclear. In this paper, we introduce a toy analog based on linear Gaussian models, observing interesting relationships between causal models, measurement noise, out-of-domain generalization, and reliance on spurious signals. Our analysis provides some insights that help to explain the efficacy of CAD. Moreover, we develop the hypothesis that while adding noise to causal features should degrade both in-domain and out-of-domain performance, adding noise to non-causal features should lead to relative improvements in out-of-domain performance. This idea inspires a speculative test for determining whether a feature attribution technique has identified the causal spans. If adding noise (e.g., by random word flips) to the highlighted spans degrades both in-domain and out-of-domain performance on a battery of challenge datasets, but adding noise to the complement gives improvements out-of-domain, it suggests we have identified causal spans. We present a large-scale empirical study comparing spans edited to create CAD to those selected by attention and saliency maps. Across numerous domains and models, we find that the hypothesized phenomenon is pronounced for CAD.
summary: In attempts to produce ML models less reliant on spurious patterns in NLP datasets, researchers have recently proposed curating counterfactually augmented data (CAD) via a human-in-the-loop process in which given some documents and their (initial) labels, humans must revise the text to make a counterfactual label applicable. Importantly, edits that are not necessary to flip the applicable label are prohibited. Models trained on the augmented data appear, empirically, to rely less on semantically irrelevant words and to generalize better out of domain. While this work draws loosely on causal thinking, the underlying causal model (even at an abstract level) and the principles underlying the observed out-of-domain improvements remain unclear. In this paper, we introduce a toy analog based on linear Gaussian models, observing interesting relationships between causal models, measurement noise, out-of-domain generalization, and reliance on spurious signals. Our analysis provides some insights that help to explain the efficacy of CAD. Moreover, we develop the hypothesis that while adding noise to causal features should degrade both in-domain and out-of-domain performance, adding noise to non-causal features should lead to relative improvements in out-of-domain performance. This idea inspires a speculative test for determining whether a feature attribution technique has identified the causal spans. If adding noise (e.g., by random word flips) to the highlighted spans degrades both in-domain and out-of-domain performance on a battery of challenge datasets, but adding noise to the complement gives improvements out-of-domain, it suggests we have identified causal spans. We present a large-scale empirical study comparing spans edited to create CAD to those selected by attention and saliency maps. Across numerous domains and models, we find that the hypothesized phenomenon is pronounced for CAD.
abstract_zh: 为了生成更少依赖 NLP 数据集中虚假模式的 ML 模型，研究人员最近提出通过人机交互过程来管理反事实增强数据 (CAD)，在该过程中，给定一些文档及其（初始）标签，人类必须修改文本以使反事实标签适用。重要的是，禁止进行不需要翻转适用标签的编辑。根据经验，在增强数据上训练的模型似乎更少依赖于语义上不相关的单词，并且能够更好地在域外进行概括。虽然这项工作松散地借鉴了因果思维，但潜在的因果模型（即使在抽象层面）和观察到的域外改进背后的原理仍然不清楚。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于线性高斯模型的玩具模拟，观察因果模型、测量噪声、域外泛化和对杂散信号的依赖之间的有趣关系。我们的分析提供了一些有助于解释 CAD 功效的见解。此外，我们提出了这样的假设：虽然向因果特征添加噪声会降低域内和域外性能，但向非因果特征添加噪声应该会导致域外性能的相对改善。这个想法激发了一种推测性测试，以确定特征归因技术是否已识别因果范围。如果向突出显示的跨度添加噪声（例如，通过随机单词翻转）会降低一系列挑战数据集的域内和域外性能，但向补集添加噪声会带来域外的改进，则表明我们已经确定了因果跨度。我们提出了一项大规模实证研究，将创建 CAD 时编辑的跨度与通过注意力图和显着性图选择的跨度进行比较。在众多领域和模型中，我们发现假设的现象在 CAD 中很明显。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析反事实增强数据（CAD）的因果机制，解释其提升模型泛化能力的原因，并提出基于噪声扰动的因果特征验证方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现CAD能减少模型对数据中虚假模式的依赖，但其因果原理及泛化能力提升的机制尚不明确，需建立理论框架进行解释。
AI.method: 构建线性高斯模型玩具示例，提出噪声扰动假设并设计实验证明：对非因果特征添加噪声可提升域外性能；通过大规模实验对比CAD编辑区域与注意力图的差异。
AI.result: 实验验证了CAD编辑区域与因果特征的强关联性，添加噪声到CAD区域会同时损害域内外性能，而对非CAD区域添加噪声则提升域外性能。
AI.conclusion: CAD通过聚焦因果特征提升模型鲁棒性，提出的新验证方法可判断特征归因技术是否识别出因果区域，为因果推理与模型解释提供理论支持。

title: Quantum Bayesian decision-making*
title_zh: 量子贝叶斯决策*
abstract: As a compact representation of joint probability distributions over a dependence graph of random variables, and a tool for modelling and reasoning in the presence of uncertainty, Bayesian networks are of great importance for artificial intelligence to combine domain knowledge, capture causal relationships, or learn from incomplete datasets. Known as a NP-hard problem in a classical setting, Bayesian inference pops up as a class of algorithms worth to explore in a quantum framework. This paper explores such a research direction and improves on previous proposals by a judicious use of the utility function in an entangled configuration. It proposes a completely quantum mechanical decision-making process with a proven computational advantage. A prototype implementation in Qiskit (a Python-based program development kit for the IBM Q machine) is discussed as a proof-of-concept.
summary: As a compact representation of joint probability distributions over a dependence graph of random variables, and a tool for modelling and reasoning in the presence of uncertainty, Bayesian networks are of great importance for artificial intelligence to combine domain knowledge, capture causal relationships, or learn from incomplete datasets. Known as a NP-hard problem in a classical setting, Bayesian inference pops up as a class of algorithms worth to explore in a quantum framework. This paper explores such a research direction and improves on previous proposals by a judicious use of the utility function in an entangled configuration. It proposes a completely quantum mechanical decision-making process with a proven computational advantage. A prototype implementation in Qiskit (a Python-based program development kit for the IBM Q machine) is discussed as a proof-of-concept.
abstract_zh: 作为随机变量依赖图上联合概率分布的紧凑表示，以及在存在不确定性的情况下进行建模和推理的工具，贝叶斯网络对于人工智能结合领域知识、捕获因果关系或从不完整数据集中学习非常重要。贝叶斯推理在经典环境中被称为 NP 难问题，它作为一类值得在量子框架中探索的算法而出现。本文探索了这样一个研究方向，并通过在纠缠配置中明智地使用效用函数来改进以前的建议。它提出了一个完全量子力学的决策过程，具有经过验证的计算优势。 Qiskit（用于 IBM Q 机器的基于 Python 的程序开发工具包）中的原型实现作为概念验证进行了讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文探索量子框架下的贝叶斯推理方法，提出基于量子效用函数的决策过程并实现原型验证。
AI.motivation: 经典贝叶斯推理为NP难问题，量子计算可能提供计算优势以处理不确定性建模与因果推理。
AI.method: 通过设计量子纠缠态下的效用函数配置，构建完全量子化决策模型，并使用Qiskit开发原型系统。
AI.result: 证明量子决策模型具有理论计算优势，完成IBM量子设备上的原型实现验证。
AI.conclusion: 量子贝叶斯决策框架展示了处理复杂概率推理的潜力，为量子人工智能提供新方向。

authors_text: Kailas Vodrahalli,Roxana Daneshjou,Roberto A Novoa,Albert Chiou,Justin M Ko,James Zou
title: TrueImage: A Machine Learning Algorithm to Improve the Quality of Telehealth Photos
title_zh: TrueImage：一种提高远程医疗照片质量的机器学习算法
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, Preprint of an article published in Pacific Symposium on Biocomputing \c{opyright} 2020 World Scientific Publishing Co., Singapore, http://psb.stanford.edu/
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, Preprint of an article published in Pacific Symposium on Biocomputing \c{opyright} 2020 World Scientific Publishing Co., Singapore, http://psb.stanford.edu/
abstract: Telehealth is an increasingly critical component of the health care ecosystem, especially due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Rapid adoption of telehealth has exposed limitations in the existing infrastructure. In this paper, we study and highlight photo quality as a major challenge in the telehealth workflow. We focus on teledermatology, where photo quality is particularly important; the framework proposed here can be generalized to other health domains. For telemedicine, dermatologists request that patients submit images of their lesions for assessment. However, these images are often of insufficient quality to make a clinical diagnosis since patients do not have experience taking clinical photos. A clinician has to manually triage poor quality images and request new images to be submitted, leading to wasted time for both the clinician and the patient. We propose an automated image assessment machine learning pipeline, TrueImage, to detect poor quality dermatology photos and to guide patients in taking better photos. Our experiments indicate that TrueImage can reject 50% of the sub-par quality images, while retaining 80% of good quality images patients send in, despite heterogeneity and limitations in the training data. These promising results suggest that our solution is feasible and can improve the quality of teledermatology care.
summary: Telehealth is an increasingly critical component of the health care ecosystem, especially due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Rapid adoption of telehealth has exposed limitations in the existing infrastructure. In this paper, we study and highlight photo quality as a major challenge in the telehealth workflow. We focus on teledermatology, where photo quality is particularly important; the framework proposed here can be generalized to other health domains. For telemedicine, dermatologists request that patients submit images of their lesions for assessment. However, these images are often of insufficient quality to make a clinical diagnosis since patients do not have experience taking clinical photos. A clinician has to manually triage poor quality images and request new images to be submitted, leading to wasted time for both the clinician and the patient. We propose an automated image assessment machine learning pipeline, TrueImage, to detect poor quality dermatology photos and to guide patients in taking better photos. Our experiments indicate that TrueImage can reject 50% of the sub-par quality images, while retaining 80% of good quality images patients send in, despite heterogeneity and limitations in the training data. These promising results suggest that our solution is feasible and can improve the quality of teledermatology care.
abstract_zh: 远程医疗是医疗保健生态系统中日益重要的组成部分，特别是由于 COVID-19 大流行。远程医疗的快速采用暴露了现有基础设施的局限性。在本文中，我们研究并强调照片质量是远程医疗工作流程中的主要挑战。我们专注于远程皮肤病学，其中照片质量尤为重要；这里提出的框架可以推广到其他卫生领域。对于远程医疗，皮肤科医生要求患者提交病变图像以进行评估。然而，由于患者没有拍摄临床照片的经验，这些图像的质量通常不足以做出临床诊断。临床医生必须手动对质量较差的图像进行分类并请求提交新图像，这会浪费临床医生和患者的时间。我们提出了一种自动图像评估机器学习管道 TrueImage，用于检测质量差的皮肤科照片并指导患者拍摄更好的照片。我们的实验表明，尽管训练数据存在异质性和局限性，TrueImage 仍可以拒绝 50% 的劣质图像，同时保留患者发送的 80% 的优质图像。这些有希望的结果表明我们的解决方案是可行的，并且可以提高远程皮肤科护理的质量。

AI.motivation: 由于新冠疫情，远程医疗变得至关重要，但现有基础设施存在局限性，特别是在照片质量方面，这给临床诊断带来了挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种自动化的图像评估机器学习流程TrueImage，用于检测低质量的皮肤科照片，并指导患者拍摄更好的照片。
AI.result: 实验表明，TrueImage可以拒绝50%的低质量图像，同时保留80%的高质量图像，尽管训练数据存在异质性和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该解决方案具有可行性，能够提高远程皮肤科护理的质量。

authors_text: Zhan Shi,Chirag Sakhuja,Milad Hashemi,Kevin Swersky,Calvin Lin
title: Learned Hardware/Software Co-Design of Neural Accelerators
title_zh: 学习神经加速器的硬件/软件协同设计
abstract: The use of deep learning has grown at an exponential rate, giving rise to numerous specialized hardware and software systems for deep learning. Because the design space of deep learning software stacks and hardware accelerators is diverse and vast, prior work considers software optimizations separately from hardware architectures, effectively reducing the search space. Unfortunately, this bifurcated approach means that many profitable design points are never explored. This paper instead casts the problem as hardware/software co-design, with the goal of automatically identifying desirable points in the joint design space. The key to our solution is a new constrained Bayesian optimization framework that avoids invalid solutions by exploiting the highly constrained features of this design space, which are semi-continuous/semi-discrete. We evaluate our optimization framework by applying it to a variety of neural models, improving the energy-delay product by 18% (ResNet) and 40% (DQN) over hand-tuned state-of-the-art systems, as well as demonstrating strong results on other neural network architectures, such as MLPs and Transformers.
summary: The use of deep learning has grown at an exponential rate, giving rise to numerous specialized hardware and software systems for deep learning. Because the design space of deep learning software stacks and hardware accelerators is diverse and vast, prior work considers software optimizations separately from hardware architectures, effectively reducing the search space. Unfortunately, this bifurcated approach means that many profitable design points are never explored. This paper instead casts the problem as hardware/software co-design, with the goal of automatically identifying desirable points in the joint design space. The key to our solution is a new constrained Bayesian optimization framework that avoids invalid solutions by exploiting the highly constrained features of this design space, which are semi-continuous/semi-discrete. We evaluate our optimization framework by applying it to a variety of neural models, improving the energy-delay product by 18% (ResNet) and 40% (DQN) over hand-tuned state-of-the-art systems, as well as demonstrating strong results on other neural network architectures, such as MLPs and Transformers.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的使用呈指数级增长，催生了众多用于深度学习的专用硬件和软件系统。由于深度学习软件堆栈和硬件加速器的设计空间多种多样且巨大，因此先前的工作将软件优化与硬件架构分开考虑，从而有效地减少了搜索空间。不幸的是，这种分叉的方法意味着许多有利可图的设计点从未被探索过。相反，本文将问题视为硬件/软件协同设计，其目标是自动识别联合设计空间中的所需点。我们解决方案的关键是一个新的约束贝叶斯优化框架，该框架通过利用该设计空间的高度约束特征（半连续/半离散）来避免无效的解决方案。我们通过将优化框架应用于各种神经模型来评估它，与手动调整的最先进系统相比，将能量延迟积提高了 18% (ResNet) 和 40% (DQN)，并在其他神经网络架构（例如 MLP 和 Transformer）上展示了强大的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过硬件/软件协同设计自动优化神经加速器的能效。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将软硬件设计分离，限制了设计空间的探索，导致无法发现潜在的高效设计点。
AI.method: 提出一种基于约束的贝叶斯优化框架，利用设计空间的半连续/半离散特性进行高效搜索。
AI.result: 在ResNet和DQN上分别提升18%和40%的能效，其他模型如MLP和Transformer也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 证明了协同设计方法在能效优化上的有效性，优于传统手动调优方法。

authors_text: Oskar van der Wal,Silvan de Boer,Elia Bruni,Dieuwke Hupkes
title: The Grammar of Emergent Languages
title_zh: 新兴语言的语法
abstract: In this paper, we consider the syntactic properties of languages emerged in referential games, using unsupervised grammar induction (UGI) techniques originally designed to analyse natural language. We show that the considered UGI techniques are appropriate to analyse emergent languages and we then study if the languages that emerge in a typical referential game setup exhibit syntactic structure, and to what extent this depends on the maximum message length and number of symbols that the agents are allowed to use. Our experiments demonstrate that a certain message length and vocabulary size are required for structure to emerge, but they also illustrate that more sophisticated game scenarios are required to obtain syntactic properties more akin to those observed in human language. We argue that UGI techniques should be part of the standard toolkit for analysing emergent languages and release a comprehensive library to facilitate such analysis for future researchers.
summary: In this paper, we consider the syntactic properties of languages emerged in referential games, using unsupervised grammar induction (UGI) techniques originally designed to analyse natural language. We show that the considered UGI techniques are appropriate to analyse emergent languages and we then study if the languages that emerge in a typical referential game setup exhibit syntactic structure, and to what extent this depends on the maximum message length and number of symbols that the agents are allowed to use. Our experiments demonstrate that a certain message length and vocabulary size are required for structure to emerge, but they also illustrate that more sophisticated game scenarios are required to obtain syntactic properties more akin to those observed in human language. We argue that UGI techniques should be part of the standard toolkit for analysing emergent languages and release a comprehensive library to facilitate such analysis for future researchers.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用最初设计用于分析自然语言的无监督语法归纳（UGI）技术来考虑参考游戏中出现的语言的句法属性。我们证明所考虑的 UGI 技术适合分析新兴语言，然后我们研究典型参考游戏设置中出现的语言是否表现出句法结构，以及这在多大程度上取决于允许代理使用的最大消息长度和符号数量。我们的实验表明，结构的出现需要一定的消息长度和词汇量，但它们也表明，需要更复杂的游戏场景才能获得更类似于人类语言中观察到的句法属性。我们认为 UGI 技术应该成为分析新兴语言的标准工具包的一部分，并发布一个综合库以方便未来研究人员进行此类分析。

AI.tldr: 本文利用无监督语法归纳技术分析指称游戏中产生的新兴语言的句法特性，并研究其结构形成的条件。
AI.motivation: 探索新兴语言是否具备类似自然语言的句法结构，以及这种结构如何受消息长度和符号数量等参数影响。
AI.method: 通过指称游戏实验生成新兴语言，应用无监督语法归纳技术分析其句法特征，并系统测试不同参数对结构形成的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明特定消息长度和词汇量是结构产生的必要条件，但更复杂的场景才能生成接近人类语言的句法特性。
AI.conclusion: 无监督语法归纳技术应成为分析新兴语言的标准工具，未来研究需设计更复杂的实验场景以逼近人类语言特征。

conclusion: 无监督语法归纳技术应成为分析新兴语言的标准工具，未来研究需设计更复杂的实验场景以逼近人类语言特征。
search_text: The Grammar of Emergent Languages 新兴语言的语法 In this paper, we consider the syntactic properties of languages emerged in referential games, using unsupervised grammar induction (UGI) techniques originally designed to analyse natural language. We show that the considered UGI techniques are appropriate to analyse emergent languages and we then study if the languages that emerge in a typical referential game setup exhibit syntactic structure, and to what extent this depends on the maximum message length and number of symbols that the agents are allowed to use. Our experiments demonstrate that a certain message length and vocabulary size are required for structure to emerge, but they also illustrate that more sophisticated game scenarios are required to obtain syntactic properties more akin to those observed in human language. We argue that UGI techniques should be part of the standard toolkit for analysing emergent languages and release a comprehensive library to facilitate such analysis for future researchers. 在本文中，我们使用最初设计用于分析自然语言的无监督语法归纳（UGI）技术来考虑参考游戏中出现的语言的句法属性。我们证明所考虑的 UGI 技术适合分析新兴语言，然后我们研究典型参考游戏设置中出现的语言是否表现出句法结构，以及这在多大程度上取决于允许代理使用的最大消息长度和符号数量。我们的实验表明，结构的出现需要一定的消息长度和词汇量，但它们也表明，需要更复杂的游戏场景才能获得更类似于人类语言中观察到的句法属性。我们认为 UGI 技术应该成为分析新兴语言的标准工具包的一部分，并发布一个综合库以方便未来研究人员进行此类分析。 本文利用无监督语法归纳技术分析指称游戏中产生的新兴语言的句法特性，并研究其结构形成的条件。 Oskar van der Wal,Silvan de Boer,Elia Bruni,Dieuwke Hupkes cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Electric Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows
title_zh: 带时间窗的电动汽车路径问题的深度强化学习
abstract: The past decade has seen a rapid penetration of electric vehicles (EV) in the market, more and more logistics and transportation companies start to deploy EVs for service provision. In order to model the operations of a commercial EV fleet, we utilize the EV routing problem with time windows (EVRPTW). In this research, we propose an end-to-end deep reinforcement learning framework to solve the EVRPTW. In particular, we develop an attention model incorporating the pointer network and a graph embedding technique to parameterize a stochastic policy for solving the EVRPTW. The model is then trained using policy gradient with rollout baseline. Our numerical studies show that the proposed model is able to efficiently solve EVRPTW instances of large sizes that are not solvable with any existing approaches.
summary: The past decade has seen a rapid penetration of electric vehicles (EV) in the market, more and more logistics and transportation companies start to deploy EVs for service provision. In order to model the operations of a commercial EV fleet, we utilize the EV routing problem with time windows (EVRPTW). In this research, we propose an end-to-end deep reinforcement learning framework to solve the EVRPTW. In particular, we develop an attention model incorporating the pointer network and a graph embedding technique to parameterize a stochastic policy for solving the EVRPTW. The model is then trained using policy gradient with rollout baseline. Our numerical studies show that the proposed model is able to efficiently solve EVRPTW instances of large sizes that are not solvable with any existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 过去十年，电动汽车（EV）快速渗透市场，越来越多的物流和运输公司开始部署电动汽车提供服务。为了对商业电动车队的运营进行建模，我们利用带时间窗的电动汽车路线问题（EVRPTW）。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个端到端的深度强化学习框架来解决 EVRPTW。特别是，我们开发了一种结合指针网络和图嵌入技术的注意力模型，以参数化解决 EVRPTW 的随机策略。然后使用带有推出基线的策略梯度来训练模型。我们的数值研究表明，所提出的模型能够有效地解决任何现有方法无法解决的大尺寸 EVRPTW 实例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的端到端框架，用于解决带时间窗的电动汽车路径规划问题（EVRPTW）。
AI.motivation: 随着电动汽车市场快速增长，传统方法难以高效解决大规模EVRPTW问题，需探索新型智能优化算法。
AI.method: 结合注意力机制与指针网络的图嵌入技术，构建随机策略模型，并采用策略梯度配合rollout基线进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型能有效求解现有方法无法处理的大规模EVRPTW实例，展现显著效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提深度强化学习框架为电动汽车路径规划提供了高效解决方案，验证了AI技术在复杂物流场景中的应用潜力。

title: Are Neural Nets Modular? Inspecting Functional Modularity Through Differentiable Weight Masks
title_zh: 神经网络是模块化的吗？通过可微分权重掩模检查功能模块化
abstract: Neural networks (NNs) whose subnetworks implement reusable functions are expected to offer numerous advantages, including compositionality through efficient recombination of functional building blocks, interpretability, preventing catastrophic interference, etc. Understanding if and how NNs are modular could provide insights into how to improve them. Current inspection methods, however, fail to link modules to their functionality. In this paper, we present a novel method based on learning binary weight masks to identify individual weights and subnets responsible for specific functions. Using this powerful tool, we contribute an extensive study of emerging modularity in NNs that covers several standard architectures and datasets. We demonstrate how common NNs fail to reuse submodules and offer new insights into the related issue of systematic generalization on language tasks.
summary: Neural networks (NNs) whose subnetworks implement reusable functions are expected to offer numerous advantages, including compositionality through efficient recombination of functional building blocks, interpretability, preventing catastrophic interference, etc. Understanding if and how NNs are modular could provide insights into how to improve them. Current inspection methods, however, fail to link modules to their functionality. In this paper, we present a novel method based on learning binary weight masks to identify individual weights and subnets responsible for specific functions. Using this powerful tool, we contribute an extensive study of emerging modularity in NNs that covers several standard architectures and datasets. We demonstrate how common NNs fail to reuse submodules and offer new insights into the related issue of systematic generalization on language tasks.
abstract_zh: 子网络实现可重用功能的神经网络 (NN) 有望提供许多优势，包括通过功能构建块的有效重组实现组合性、可解释性、防止灾难性干扰等。了解 NN 是否模块化以及如何模块化可以为如何改进它们提供见解。然而，当前的检查方法无法将模块与其功能联系起来。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习二进制权重掩码的新颖方法，以识别负责特定功能的各个权重和子网。使用这个强大的工具，我们对神经网络中的新兴模块化进行了广泛的研究，涵盖了多个标准架构和数据集。我们展示了常见的神经网络如何无法重用子模块，并为语言任务系统泛化的相关问题提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 通过可微分权重掩码研究神经网络的功能模块化特性
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法关联模块与功能，而模块化网络具有可解释性等优势，需探究其形成机制
AI.method: 提出学习二进制权重掩码的方法，识别负责特定功能的权重和子网络
AI.result: 发现常见神经网络难以重用子模块，揭示语言任务中系统泛化的新问题
AI.conclusion: 现有神经网络缺乏模块化，需改进设计以提升模块化和泛化能力

title: Detecting Misclassification Errors in Neural Networks with a Gaussian Process Model
title_zh: 使用高斯过程模型检测神经网络中的误分类错误
comment: Published in AAAI 2022. 39 pages, 4 figures, 17 tables
comments: Published in AAAI 2022. 39 pages, 4 figures, 17 tables
abstract: As neural network classifiers are deployed in real-world applications, it is crucial that their failures can be detected reliably. One practical solution is to assign confidence scores to each prediction, then use these scores to filter out possible misclassifications. However, existing confidence metrics are not yet sufficiently reliable for this role. This paper presents a new framework that produces a quantitative metric for detecting misclassification errors. This framework, RED, builds an error detector on top of the base classifier and estimates uncertainty of the detection scores using Gaussian Processes. Experimental comparisons with other error detection methods on 125 UCI datasets demonstrate that this approach is effective. Further implementations on two probabilistic base classifiers and two large deep learning architecture in vision tasks further confirm that the method is robust and scalable. Third, an empirical analysis of RED with out-of-distribution and adversarial samples shows that the method can be used not only to detect errors but also to understand where they come from. RED can thereby be used to improve trustworthiness of neural network classifiers more broadly in the future.
summary: As neural network classifiers are deployed in real-world applications, it is crucial that their failures can be detected reliably. One practical solution is to assign confidence scores to each prediction, then use these scores to filter out possible misclassifications. However, existing confidence metrics are not yet sufficiently reliable for this role. This paper presents a new framework that produces a quantitative metric for detecting misclassification errors. This framework, RED, builds an error detector on top of the base classifier and estimates uncertainty of the detection scores using Gaussian Processes. Experimental comparisons with other error detection methods on 125 UCI datasets demonstrate that this approach is effective. Further implementations on two probabilistic base classifiers and two large deep learning architecture in vision tasks further confirm that the method is robust and scalable. Third, an empirical analysis of RED with out-of-distribution and adversarial samples shows that the method can be used not only to detect errors but also to understand where they come from. RED can thereby be used to improve trustworthiness of neural network classifiers more broadly in the future.
abstract_zh: 随着神经网络分类器在实际应用中的部署，能够可靠地检测到它们的故障至关重要。一种实用的解决方案是为每个预测分配置信度分数，然后使用这些分数来过滤掉可能的错误分类。然而，现有的置信度指标对于这个角色来说还不够可靠。本文提出了一种新的框架，可以产生用于检测错误分类错误的定量指标。该框架 RED 在基本分类器之上构建了一个错误检测器，并使用高斯过程估计检测分数的不确定性。在 125 个 UCI 数据集上与其他错误检测方法的实验比较表明该方法是有效的。视觉任务中两个概率基分类器和两个大型深度学习架构的进一步实现进一步证实了该方法的稳健性和可扩展性。第三，对分布外和对抗样本的 RED 进行的实证分析表明，该方法不仅可以用来检测错误，还可以用来了解错误的来源。因此，RED 未来可用于更广泛地提高神经网络分类器的可信度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RED框架，利用高斯过程模型检测神经网络分类器的误分类错误。
AI.motivation: 现有置信度指标无法可靠检测神经网络预测错误，需更稳健的误分类检测方法。
AI.method: 构建RED框架，在基础分类器上叠加错误检测器，通过高斯过程建模检测分数的不确定性。
AI.result: 在125个UCI数据集及视觉任务中验证有效性，对分布外样本和对抗样本具有鲁棒性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: RED可提升神经网络分类器的可信度，未来可用于更广泛的安全关键场景。
