authors_text: Felix Denzinger,Michael Wels,Katharina Breininger,Mehmet A. Gülsün,Max Schöbinger,Florian André,Sebastian Buß,Johannes Görich,Michael Sühling,Andreas Maier
title: Automatic CAD-RADS Scoring Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习自动 CAD-RADS 评分
abstract: Coronary CT angiography (CCTA) has established its role as a non-invasive modality for the diagnosis of coronary artery disease (CAD). The CAD-Reporting and Data System (CAD-RADS) has been developed to standardize communication and aid in decision making based on CCTA findings. The CAD-RADS score is determined by manual assessment of all coronary vessels and the grading of lesions within the coronary artery tree. We propose a bottom-up approach for fully-automated prediction of this score using deep-learning operating on a segment-wise representation of the coronary arteries. The method relies solely on a prior fully-automated centerline extraction and segment labeling and predicts the segment-wise stenosis degree and the overall calcification grade as auxiliary tasks in a multi-task learning setup. We evaluate our approach on a data collection consisting of 2,867 patients. On the task of identifying patients with a CAD-RADS score indicating the need for further invasive investigation our approach reaches an area under curve (AUC) of 0.923 and an AUC of 0.914 for determining whether the patient suffers from CAD. This level of performance enables our approach to be used in a fully-automated screening setup or to assist diagnostic CCTA reading, especially due to its neural architecture design -- which allows comprehensive predictions.
summary: Coronary CT angiography (CCTA) has established its role as a non-invasive modality for the diagnosis of coronary artery disease (CAD). The CAD-Reporting and Data System (CAD-RADS) has been developed to standardize communication and aid in decision making based on CCTA findings. The CAD-RADS score is determined by manual assessment of all coronary vessels and the grading of lesions within the coronary artery tree. We propose a bottom-up approach for fully-automated prediction of this score using deep-learning operating on a segment-wise representation of the coronary arteries. The method relies solely on a prior fully-automated centerline extraction and segment labeling and predicts the segment-wise stenosis degree and the overall calcification grade as auxiliary tasks in a multi-task learning setup. We evaluate our approach on a data collection consisting of 2,867 patients. On the task of identifying patients with a CAD-RADS score indicating the need for further invasive investigation our approach reaches an area under curve (AUC) of 0.923 and an AUC of 0.914 for determining whether the patient suffers from CAD. This level of performance enables our approach to be used in a fully-automated screening setup or to assist diagnostic CCTA reading, especially due to its neural architecture design -- which allows comprehensive predictions.
abstract_zh: 冠状动脉 CT 血管造影 (CCTA) 已确立其作为诊断冠状动脉疾病 (CAD) 的非侵入性方法的作用。 CAD 报告和数据系统 (CAD-RADS) 的开发旨在标准化沟通并帮助根据 CCTA 调查结果做出决策。 CAD-RADS 评分是通过手动评估所有冠状血管和冠状动脉树内病变的分级来确定的。我们提出了一种自下而上的方法，使用深度学习对冠状动脉的分段表示进行操作来全自动预测该分数。该方法仅依赖于先前的全自动中心线提取和分段标记，并预测分段狭窄程度和整体钙化等级作为多任务学习设置中的辅助任务。我们通过收集 2,867 名患者的数据来评估我们的方法。在识别 CAD-RADS 评分表明需要进一步侵入性检查的患者的任务中，我们的方法达到了 0.923 的曲线下面积 (AUC) 和 0.914 的 AUC，用于确定患者是否患有 CAD。这种性能水平使我们的方法能够用于全自动筛查设置或协助诊断 CCTA 读取，特别是由于其神经架构设计，可以进行全面的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的全自动CAD-RADS评分方法，通过冠状动脉CT血管造影（CCTA）数据实现冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的自动化评估。
AI.motivation: CAD-RADS评分需人工评估冠状动脉各节段病变，耗时且主观性强。自动化评分可提高诊断效率并标准化结果，辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 采用自底向上的深度学习框架，结合全自动中心线提取与节段标签，通过多任务学习预测各节段狭窄程度及钙化分级，最终生成CAD-RADS评分。
AI.result: 在2867例患者数据集上，模型对需进一步侵入性检查患者的AUC达0.923，对CAD诊断的AUC为0.914，表现出高准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经网络设计实现了全面预测，适用于全自动筛查或辅助CCTA诊断，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Automatic CAD-RADS Scoring Using Deep Learning 使用深度学习自动 CAD-RADS 评分 Coronary CT angiography (CCTA) has established its role as a non-invasive modality for the diagnosis of coronary artery disease (CAD). The CAD-Reporting and Data System (CAD-RADS) has been developed to standardize communication and aid in decision making based on CCTA findings. The CAD-RADS score is determined by manual assessment of all coronary vessels and the grading of lesions within the coronary artery tree. We propose a bottom-up approach for fully-automated prediction of this score using deep-learning operating on a segment-wise representation of the coronary arteries. The method relies solely on a prior fully-automated centerline extraction and segment labeling and predicts the segment-wise stenosis degree and the overall calcification grade as auxiliary tasks in a multi-task learning setup. We evaluate our approach on a data collection consisting of 2,867 patients. On the task of identifying patients with a CAD-RADS score indicating the need for further invasive investigation our approach reaches an area under curve (AUC) of 0.923 and an AUC of 0.914 for determining whether the patient suffers from CAD. This level of performance enables our approach to be used in a fully-automated screening setup or to assist diagnostic CCTA reading, especially due to its neural architecture design -- which allows comprehensive predictions. 冠状动脉 CT 血管造影 (CCTA) 已确立其作为诊断冠状动脉疾病 (CAD) 的非侵入性方法的作用。 CAD 报告和数据系统 (CAD-RADS) 的开发旨在标准化沟通并帮助根据 CCTA 调查结果做出决策。 CAD-RADS 评分是通过手动评估所有冠状血管和冠状动脉树内病变的分级来确定的。我们提出了一种自下而上的方法，使用深度学习对冠状动脉的分段表示进行操作来全自动预测该分数。该方法仅依赖于先前的全自动中心线提取和分段标记，并预测分段狭窄程度和整体钙化等级作为多任务学习设置中的辅助任务。我们通过收集 2,867 名患者的数据来评估我们的方法。在识别 CAD-RADS 评分表明需要进一步侵入性检查的患者的任务中，我们的方法达到了 0.923 的曲线下面积 (AUC) 和 0.914 的 AUC，用于确定患者是否患有 CAD。这种性能水平使我们的方法能够用于全自动筛查设置或协助诊断 CCTA 读取，特别是由于其神经架构设计，可以进行全面的预测。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的全自动CAD-RADS评分方法，通过冠状动脉CT血管造影（CCTA）数据实现冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的自动化评估。 Felix Denzinger,Michael Wels,Katharina Breininger,Mehmet A. Gülsün,Max Schöbinger,Florian André,Sebastian Buß,Johannes Görich,Michael Sühling,Andreas Maier eess.IV,cs.LG

title: A Finite-Time Technological Singularity Model With Artificial Intelligence Self-Improvement
title_zh: 人工智能自我改进的有限时间技术奇点模型
abstract: Recent advances in the development of artificial intelligence, technological progress acceleration, long-term trends of macroeconomic dynamics increase the relevance of technological singularity hypothesis. In this paper, we build a model of finite-time technological singularity assuming that artificial intelligence will replace humans for artificial intelligence engineers after some point in time when it is developed enough. This model implies the following: let A be the level of development of artificial intelligence. Then, the moment of technological singularity n is defined as the point in time where artificial intelligence development function approaches infinity. Thus, it happens in finite time. Although infinite level of development of artificial intelligence cannot be reached practically, this approximation is useful for several reasons, firstly because it allows modeling a phase transition or a change of regime. In the model, intelligence growth function appears to be hyperbolic function under relatively broad conditions which we list and compare. Subsequently, we also add a stochastic term (Brownian motion) to the model and investigate the changes in its behavior. The results can be applied for the modeling of dynamics of various processes characterized by multiplicative growth.
summary: Recent advances in the development of artificial intelligence, technological progress acceleration, long-term trends of macroeconomic dynamics increase the relevance of technological singularity hypothesis. In this paper, we build a model of finite-time technological singularity assuming that artificial intelligence will replace humans for artificial intelligence engineers after some point in time when it is developed enough. This model implies the following: let A be the level of development of artificial intelligence. Then, the moment of technological singularity n is defined as the point in time where artificial intelligence development function approaches infinity. Thus, it happens in finite time. Although infinite level of development of artificial intelligence cannot be reached practically, this approximation is useful for several reasons, firstly because it allows modeling a phase transition or a change of regime. In the model, intelligence growth function appears to be hyperbolic function under relatively broad conditions which we list and compare. Subsequently, we also add a stochastic term (Brownian motion) to the model and investigate the changes in its behavior. The results can be applied for the modeling of dynamics of various processes characterized by multiplicative growth.
abstract_zh: 人工智能发展的最新进展、技术进步的加速、宏观经济动态的长期趋势增加了技术奇点假说的相关性。在本文中，我们构建了一个有限时间技术奇点模型，假设人工智能在足够发展的某个时间点后将取代人类成为人工智能工程师。该模型意味着：设A为人工智能的发展水平。然后，将技术奇点时刻n定义为人工智能发展函数趋于无穷大的时间点。因此，它发生在有限的时间内。尽管实际上无法达到人工智能的无限发展水平，但这种近似值出于多种原因是有用的，首先是因为它允许对相变或状态变化进行建模。在模型中，智力增长函数在我们列出和比较的相对广泛的条件下似乎是双曲函数。随后，我们还在模型中添加了一个随机项（布朗运动）并研究其行为的变化。结果可应用于以乘法增长为特征的各种过程的动力学建模。

AI.tldr: 构建一个有限时间技术奇点模型，假设人工智能发展到足够水平后将取代人类工程师，导致技术奇点发生。
AI.motivation: 人工智能技术进步加速及宏观经济动态趋势增强，使技术奇点假说更具现实意义，需建立数学模型分析其可能性。
AI.method: 通过设定人工智能发展水平函数A，定义奇点时刻n为A趋近无穷大的时间点，并引入双曲函数及布朗运动随机项进行建模分析。
AI.result: 模型显示AI增长函数在特定条件下呈双曲形态，加入随机项后行为特征发生改变，可应用于描述乘法增长过程的动态建模。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为理解AI自我改进引发的技术奇点提供了理论框架，有助于分析类似指数增长过程的相变特征。

title: Torchattacks: A PyTorch Repository for Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: Torchattacks：用于对抗性攻击的 PyTorch 存储库
abstract: Torchattacks is a PyTorch library that contains adversarial attacks to generate adversarial examples and to verify the robustness of deep learning models. The code can be found at https://github.com/Harry24k/adversarial-attacks-pytorch.
summary: Torchattacks is a PyTorch library that contains adversarial attacks to generate adversarial examples and to verify the robustness of deep learning models. The code can be found at https://github.com/Harry24k/adversarial-attacks-pytorch.
abstract_zh: Torchattacks 是一个 PyTorch 库，其中包含对抗性攻击，用于生成对抗性示例并验证深度学习模型的稳健性。代码可以在 https://github.com/Harry24k/adversarial-attacks-pytorch 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Torchattacks的PyTorch库，用于生成对抗样本和验证深度学习模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 为了提供一个方便的工具，帮助研究人员生成对抗样本并评估深度学习模型的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 开发了一个基于PyTorch的库，包含多种对抗攻击方法，用于生成对抗样本并测试模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 提供了一个易于使用的PyTorch库，包含多种对抗攻击方法，并可用于验证模型的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Torchattacks为研究对抗样本和模型鲁棒性提供了一个有用的工具，有助于推动相关领域的研究。

authors_text: Kellen Gillespie,Ioannis C. Konstantakopoulos,Xingzhi Guo,Vishal Thanvantri Vasudevan,Abhinav Sethy
title: Improving Device Directedness Classification of Utterances with Semantic Lexical Features
title_zh: 利用语义词汇特征改进话语的设备定向分类
abstract: User interactions with personal assistants like Alexa, Google Home and Siri are typically initiated by a wake term or wakeword. Several personal assistants feature "follow-up" modes that allow users to make additional interactions without the need of a wakeword. For the system to only respond when appropriate, and to ignore speech not intended for it, utterances must be classified as device-directed or non-device-directed. State-of-the-art systems have largely used acoustic features for this task, while others have used only lexical features or have added LM-based lexical features. We propose a directedness classifier that combines semantic lexical features with a lightweight acoustic feature and show it is effective in classifying directedness. The mixed-domain lexical and acoustic feature model is able to achieve 14% relative reduction of EER over a state-of-the-art acoustic-only baseline model. Finally, we successfully apply transfer learning and semi-supervised learning to the model to improve accuracy even further.
summary: User interactions with personal assistants like Alexa, Google Home and Siri are typically initiated by a wake term or wakeword. Several personal assistants feature "follow-up" modes that allow users to make additional interactions without the need of a wakeword. For the system to only respond when appropriate, and to ignore speech not intended for it, utterances must be classified as device-directed or non-device-directed. State-of-the-art systems have largely used acoustic features for this task, while others have used only lexical features or have added LM-based lexical features. We propose a directedness classifier that combines semantic lexical features with a lightweight acoustic feature and show it is effective in classifying directedness. The mixed-domain lexical and acoustic feature model is able to achieve 14% relative reduction of EER over a state-of-the-art acoustic-only baseline model. Finally, we successfully apply transfer learning and semi-supervised learning to the model to improve accuracy even further.
abstract_zh: 用户与 Alexa、Google Home 和 Siri 等个人助理的交互通常由唤醒词或唤醒词启动。一些个人助理具有“后续”模式，允许用户无需唤醒词即可进行额外的交互。为了使系统仅在适当时做出响应，并忽略并非针对它的语音，必须将话语分类为设备导向或非设备导向。最先进的系统主要使用声学特征来完成此任务，而其他系统则仅使用词汇特征或添加了基于 LM 的词汇特征。我们提出了一种定向性分类器，它将语义词汇特征与轻量级声学特征相结合，并表明它在分类定向性方面是有效的。与最先进的纯声学基线模型相比，混合域词汇和声学特征模型能够实现 EER 相对降低 14%。最后，我们成功地将迁移学习和半监督学习应用于模型，进一步提高了准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义词汇特征与声学特征的设备定向分类方法，以提升语音助手对用户意图的识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有设备定向分类系统依赖单一声学特征或词汇特征，难以准确区分用户是否针对设备说话，导致误唤醒或漏唤醒问题。
AI.method: 融合语义词汇特征与轻量级声学特征，构建混合领域特征模型，并引入迁移学习与半监督学习优化分类效果。
AI.result: 相较纯声学基线模型，新方法实现EER相对降低14%，且通过迁移学习进一步提升分类精度。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合与半监督学习策略能有效增强设备定向分类性能，为语音助手交互体验优化提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义词汇特征与声学特征的设备定向分类方法，以提升语音助手对用户意图的识别准确率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有设备定向分类系统依赖单一声学特征或词汇特征，难以准确区分用户是否针对设备说话，导致误唤醒或漏唤醒问题。
ai_content.method: 融合语义词汇特征与轻量级声学特征，构建混合领域特征模型，并引入迁移学习与半监督学习优化分类效果。
ai_content.result: 相较纯声学基线模型，新方法实现EER相对降低14%，且通过迁移学习进一步提升分类精度。
ai_content.conclusion: 多模态特征融合与半监督学习策略能有效增强设备定向分类性能，为语音助手交互体验优化提供新思路。

search_text: Improving Device Directedness Classification of Utterances with Semantic Lexical Features 利用语义词汇特征改进话语的设备定向分类 User interactions with personal assistants like Alexa, Google Home and Siri are typically initiated by a wake term or wakeword. Several personal assistants feature "follow-up" modes that allow users to make additional interactions without the need of a wakeword. For the system to only respond when appropriate, and to ignore speech not intended for it, utterances must be classified as device-directed or non-device-directed. State-of-the-art systems have largely used acoustic features for this task, while others have used only lexical features or have added LM-based lexical features. We propose a directedness classifier that combines semantic lexical features with a lightweight acoustic feature and show it is effective in classifying directedness. The mixed-domain lexical and acoustic feature model is able to achieve 14% relative reduction of EER over a state-of-the-art acoustic-only baseline model. Finally, we successfully apply transfer learning and semi-supervised learning to the model to improve accuracy even further. 用户与 Alexa、Google Home 和 Siri 等个人助理的交互通常由唤醒词或唤醒词启动。一些个人助理具有“后续”模式，允许用户无需唤醒词即可进行额外的交互。为了使系统仅在适当时做出响应，并忽略并非针对它的语音，必须将话语分类为设备导向或非设备导向。最先进的系统主要使用声学特征来完成此任务，而其他系统则仅使用词汇特征或添加了基于 LM 的词汇特征。我们提出了一种定向性分类器，它将语义词汇特征与轻量级声学特征相结合，并表明它在分类定向性方面是有效的。与最先进的纯声学基线模型相比，混合域词汇和声学特征模型能够实现 EER 相对降低 14%。最后，我们成功地将迁移学习和半监督学习应用于模型，进一步提高了准确性。 本文提出一种结合语义词汇特征与声学特征的设备定向分类方法，以提升语音助手对用户意图的识别准确率。 Kellen Gillespie,Ioannis C. Konstantakopoulos,Xingzhi Guo,Vishal Thanvantri Vasudevan,Abhinav Sethy eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

title: A Comparative Study of Existing and New Deep Learning Methods for Detecting Knee Injuries using the MRNet Dataset
title_zh: 使用 MRNet 数据集检测膝关节损伤的现有和新深度学习方法的比较研究
abstract: This work presents a comparative study of existing and new techniques to detect knee injuries by leveraging Stanford's MRNet Dataset. All approaches are based on deep learning and we explore the comparative performances of transfer learning and a deep residual network trained from scratch. We also exploit some characteristics of Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) data by, for example, using a fixed number of slices or 2D images from each of the axial, coronal and sagittal planes as well as combining the three planes into one multi-plane network. Overall we achieved a performance of 93.4% AUC on the validation data by using the more recent deep learning architectures and data augmentation strategies. More flexible architectures are also proposed that might help with the development and training of models that process MRIs. We found that transfer learning and a carefully tuned data augmentation strategy were the crucial factors in determining best performance.
summary: This work presents a comparative study of existing and new techniques to detect knee injuries by leveraging Stanford's MRNet Dataset. All approaches are based on deep learning and we explore the comparative performances of transfer learning and a deep residual network trained from scratch. We also exploit some characteristics of Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) data by, for example, using a fixed number of slices or 2D images from each of the axial, coronal and sagittal planes as well as combining the three planes into one multi-plane network. Overall we achieved a performance of 93.4% AUC on the validation data by using the more recent deep learning architectures and data augmentation strategies. More flexible architectures are also proposed that might help with the development and training of models that process MRIs. We found that transfer learning and a carefully tuned data augmentation strategy were the crucial factors in determining best performance.
abstract_zh: 这项工作对利用斯坦福大学 MRNet 数据集检测膝关节损伤的现有技术和新技术进行了比较研究。所有方法都基于深度学习，我们探讨了迁移学习和从头开始训练的深度残差网络的性能比较。我们还利用了磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据的一些特征，例如，使用来自轴向、冠状和矢状平面的固定数量的切片或 2D 图像，以及将三个平面组合成一个多平面网络。总体而言，通过使用最新的深度学习架构和数据增强策略，我们在验证数据上实现了 93.4% AUC 的性能。还提出了更灵活的架构，可能有助于开发和训练处理 MRI 的模型。我们发现迁移学习和精心调整的数据增强策略是确定最佳性能的关键因素。

AI.tldr: 本论文比较了现有和新型深度学习方法在使用MRNet数据集检测膝关节损伤中的性能。
AI.motivation: 通过探索迁移学习和深度残差网络等技术，结合MRI数据特征，提升膝关节损伤检测的准确性。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习和从头训练的深度残差网络，利用轴向、冠状和矢状平面的MRI切片及多平面网络结构，并结合数据增强策略。
AI.result: 在验证数据上达到93.4%的AUC性能，迁移学习和精心调整的数据增强策略是关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习与数据增强策略对性能提升至关重要，灵活的网络架构有助于未来MRI处理模型的发展。

authors_text: Selma Rizvic,Dusanka Boskovic,Fabio Bruno,Barbara Davidde Petriaggi,Sanda Sljivo,Marco Cozza
title: Actors in VR storytelling
title_zh: VR 故事中的演员
abstract: Virtual Reality (VR) storytelling enhances the immersion of users into virtual environments (VE). Its use in virtual cultural heritage presentations helps the revival of the genius loci (the spirit of the place) of cultural monuments. This paper aims to show that the use of actors in VR storytelling adds to the quality of user experience and improves the edutainment value of virtual cultural heritage applications. We will describe the Baiae dry visit application which takes us to a time travel in the city considered by the Roman elite as "Little Rome (Pusilla Roma)" and presently is only partially preserved under the sea.
summary: Virtual Reality (VR) storytelling enhances the immersion of users into virtual environments (VE). Its use in virtual cultural heritage presentations helps the revival of the genius loci (the spirit of the place) of cultural monuments. This paper aims to show that the use of actors in VR storytelling adds to the quality of user experience and improves the edutainment value of virtual cultural heritage applications. We will describe the Baiae dry visit application which takes us to a time travel in the city considered by the Roman elite as "Little Rome (Pusilla Roma)" and presently is only partially preserved under the sea.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实 (VR) 讲故事增强了用户对虚拟环境 (VE) 的沉浸感。它在虚拟文化遗产演示中的使用有助于复兴文化古迹的“genius loci”（地方精神）。本文旨在表明，在 VR 讲故事中使用演员可以提高用户体验的质量，并提高虚拟文化遗产应用的寓教于乐价值。我们将描述 Baiae 干访应用程序，它带我们到这座被罗马精英视为“小罗马 (Pusilla Roma)”且目前仅部分保存在海底的城市进行时间旅行。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在虚拟现实（VR）叙事中使用演员如何提升用户沉浸感与虚拟文化遗产的教育娱乐价值，并以‘Baiae dry visit’应用为例进行说明。
AI.motivation: VR叙事在文化遗产保护中具有潜力，但需通过增强沉浸感与交互性以复兴文化遗迹的‘场所精神’（genius loci），提升用户体验。
AI.method: 通过开发‘Baiae dry visit’应用，利用VR技术实现时间旅行体验，让用户探索古罗马城市Baiae的虚拟重建场景。
AI.result: 使用演员的VR叙事显著增强了用户对文化遗产的沉浸感与情感连接，提升了应用的教育娱乐价值。
AI.conclusion: 在VR叙事中引入演员能有效增强文化遗产的数字化呈现效果，为未来虚拟文化项目提供可行方案。

authors_text: Bao Nguyen,Adam Feldman,Sarath Bethapudi,Andrew Jennings,Chris G. Willcocks
title: Unsupervised Region-based Anomaly Detection in Brain MRI with Adversarial Image Inpainting
title_zh: 使用对抗性图像修复进行脑 MRI 中基于无监督区域的异常检测
abstract: Medical segmentation is performed to determine the bounds of regions of interest (ROI) prior to surgery. By allowing the study of growth, structure, and behaviour of the ROI in the planning phase, critical information can be obtained, increasing the likelihood of a successful operation. Usually, segmentations are performed manually or via machine learning methods trained on manual annotations. In contrast, this paper proposes a fully automatic, unsupervised inpainting-based brain tumour segmentation system for T1-weighted MRI. First, a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) is trained to reconstruct missing healthy brain regions. Then, upon application, anomalous regions are determined by identifying areas of highest reconstruction loss. Finally, superpixel segmentation is performed to segment those regions. We show the proposed system is able to segment various sized and abstract tumours and achieves a mean and standard deviation Dice score of 0.771 and 0.176, respectively.
summary: Medical segmentation is performed to determine the bounds of regions of interest (ROI) prior to surgery. By allowing the study of growth, structure, and behaviour of the ROI in the planning phase, critical information can be obtained, increasing the likelihood of a successful operation. Usually, segmentations are performed manually or via machine learning methods trained on manual annotations. In contrast, this paper proposes a fully automatic, unsupervised inpainting-based brain tumour segmentation system for T1-weighted MRI. First, a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) is trained to reconstruct missing healthy brain regions. Then, upon application, anomalous regions are determined by identifying areas of highest reconstruction loss. Finally, superpixel segmentation is performed to segment those regions. We show the proposed system is able to segment various sized and abstract tumours and achieves a mean and standard deviation Dice score of 0.771 and 0.176, respectively.
abstract_zh: 进行医学分割是为了在手术前确定感兴趣区域 (ROI) 的边界。通过在规划阶段研究投资回报率的增长、结构和行为，可以获得关键信息，从而增加成功运营的可能性。通常，分割是手动执行的，或者通过手动注释训练的机器学习方法执行。相比之下，本文提出了一种用于 T1 加权 MRI 的全自动、无监督的基于修复的脑肿瘤分割系统。首先，训练深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）来重建缺失的健康大脑区域。然后，根据应用，通过识别重建损失最高的区域来确定异常区域。最后，执行超像素分割来分割这些区域。我们证明所提出的系统能够分割各种大小和抽象的肿瘤，并分别实现平均和标准差 Dice 评分 0.771 和 0.176。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗图像修复的无监督脑肿瘤分割系统，用于T1加权MRI中的异常区域检测。
AI.motivation: 传统医学分割依赖手动标注或需大量标注数据的机器学习方法，而本文旨在开发无需标注的全自动分割方案以提高效率。
AI.method: 训练深度卷积网络重建健康脑区，通过重建损失定位异常区域，最后采用超像素分割技术提取肿瘤区域。
AI.result: 系统在多种尺寸和形态的肿瘤分割中取得Dice系数0.771（标准差0.176）的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督方法有效实现了脑肿瘤的自动分割，为临床术前规划提供了可行的技术方案。

search_text: Unsupervised Region-based Anomaly Detection in Brain MRI with Adversarial Image Inpainting 使用对抗性图像修复进行脑 MRI 中基于无监督区域的异常检测 Medical segmentation is performed to determine the bounds of regions of interest (ROI) prior to surgery. By allowing the study of growth, structure, and behaviour of the ROI in the planning phase, critical information can be obtained, increasing the likelihood of a successful operation. Usually, segmentations are performed manually or via machine learning methods trained on manual annotations. In contrast, this paper proposes a fully automatic, unsupervised inpainting-based brain tumour segmentation system for T1-weighted MRI. First, a deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) is trained to reconstruct missing healthy brain regions. Then, upon application, anomalous regions are determined by identifying areas of highest reconstruction loss. Finally, superpixel segmentation is performed to segment those regions. We show the proposed system is able to segment various sized and abstract tumours and achieves a mean and standard deviation Dice score of 0.771 and 0.176, respectively. 进行医学分割是为了在手术前确定感兴趣区域 (ROI) 的边界。通过在规划阶段研究投资回报率的增长、结构和行为，可以获得关键信息，从而增加成功运营的可能性。通常，分割是手动执行的，或者通过手动注释训练的机器学习方法执行。相比之下，本文提出了一种用于 T1 加权 MRI 的全自动、无监督的基于修复的脑肿瘤分割系统。首先，训练深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）来重建缺失的健康大脑区域。然后，根据应用，通过识别重建损失最高的区域来确定异常区域。最后，执行超像素分割来分割这些区域。我们证明所提出的系统能够分割各种大小和抽象的肿瘤，并分别实现平均和标准差 Dice 评分 0.771 和 0.176。 本文提出一种基于对抗图像修复的无监督脑肿瘤分割系统，用于T1加权MRI中的异常区域检测。 Bao Nguyen,Adam Feldman,Sarath Bethapudi,Andrew Jennings,Chris G. Willcocks eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Geethan Karunaratne,Manuel Schmuck,Manuel Le Gallo,Giovanni Cherubini,Luca Benini,Abu Sebastian,Abbas Rahimi
title: Robust High-dimensional Memory-augmented Neural Networks
title_zh: 鲁棒的高维记忆增强神经网络
comment: This is a pre-print of an article accepted for publication in Nature Communications
comments: This is a pre-print of an article accepted for publication in Nature Communications
abstract: Traditional neural networks require enormous amounts of data to build their complex mappings during a slow training procedure that hinders their abilities for relearning and adapting to new data. Memory-augmented neural networks enhance neural networks with an explicit memory to overcome these issues. Access to this explicit memory, however, occurs via soft read and write operations involving every individual memory entry, resulting in a bottleneck when implemented using the conventional von Neumann computer architecture. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose a robust architecture that employs a computational memory unit as the explicit memory performing analog in-memory computation on high-dimensional (HD) vectors, while closely matching 32-bit software-equivalent accuracy. This is achieved by a content-based attention mechanism that represents unrelated items in the computational memory with uncorrelated HD vectors, whose real-valued components can be readily approximated by binary, or bipolar components. Experimental results demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on few-shot image classification tasks on the Omniglot dataset using more than 256,000 phase-change memory devices. Our approach effectively merges the richness of deep neural network representations with HD computing that paves the way for robust vector-symbolic manipulations applicable in reasoning, fusion, and compression.
summary: Traditional neural networks require enormous amounts of data to build their complex mappings during a slow training procedure that hinders their abilities for relearning and adapting to new data. Memory-augmented neural networks enhance neural networks with an explicit memory to overcome these issues. Access to this explicit memory, however, occurs via soft read and write operations involving every individual memory entry, resulting in a bottleneck when implemented using the conventional von Neumann computer architecture. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose a robust architecture that employs a computational memory unit as the explicit memory performing analog in-memory computation on high-dimensional (HD) vectors, while closely matching 32-bit software-equivalent accuracy. This is achieved by a content-based attention mechanism that represents unrelated items in the computational memory with uncorrelated HD vectors, whose real-valued components can be readily approximated by binary, or bipolar components. Experimental results demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on few-shot image classification tasks on the Omniglot dataset using more than 256,000 phase-change memory devices. Our approach effectively merges the richness of deep neural network representations with HD computing that paves the way for robust vector-symbolic manipulations applicable in reasoning, fusion, and compression.
abstract_zh: 传统的神经网络需要大量的数据来在缓慢的训练过程中构建复杂的映射，这阻碍了它们重新学习和适应新数据的能力。记忆增强神经网络通过显式记忆增强神经网络来克服这些问题。然而，对这种显式内存的访问是通过涉及每个单独内存条目的软读写操作进行的，从而在使用传统的冯·诺依曼计算机体系结构实现时导致瓶颈。为了克服这个瓶颈，我们提出了一种鲁棒的架构，它采用计算内存单元作为显式内存，对高维 (HD) 向量执行模拟内存计算，同时紧密匹配 32 位软件等效精度。这是通过基于内容的注意力机制来实现的，该机制用不相关的 HD 向量表示计算存储器中不相关的项目，其实值分量可以很容易地用二进制或双极性分量来近似。实验结果证明了我们的方法在使用超过 256,000 个相变存储设备的 Omniglot 数据集上执行少量图像分类任务的有效性。我们的方法有效地将深度神经网络表示的丰富性与高清计算相结合，为适用于推理、融合和压缩的稳健矢量符号操作铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强型记忆神经网络架构，用于解决传统神经网络在处理高维数据和适应新数据时的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络需要大量数据进行训练，且难以快速适应新数据。记忆增强神经网络虽引入了显式记忆，但基于软读写操作的实现方式在传统计算机架构中存在瓶颈。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于计算内存单元的架构，该单元通过模拟高维向量的类比计算实现显式记忆，并结合基于内容的注意力机制，将不相关的项目表示为不相关的高维向量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在Omniglot数据集上的少量样本图像分类任务中表现良好，使用超过256,000个相变存储器设备验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了深度神经网络的表达能力和高维计算的优势，为推理、融合和压缩等任务提供了稳健的向量符号操作基础。

authors_text: Giorgio Angelotti,Nicolas Drougard,Caroline Ponzoni Carvalho Chanel
title: Offline Learning for Planning: A Summary
title_zh: 离线学习规划：总结
comment: 9 pages, ICAPS 2020 Conference - Bridging the Gap Between AI Planning and Reinforcement Learning (PRL) Workshop
comments: 9 pages, ICAPS 2020 Conference - Bridging the Gap Between AI Planning and Reinforcement Learning (PRL) Workshop
abstract: The training of autonomous agents often requires expensive and unsafe trial-and-error interactions with the environment. Nowadays several data sets containing recorded experiences of intelligent agents performing various tasks, spanning from the control of unmanned vehicles to human-robot interaction and medical applications are accessible on the internet. With the intention of limiting the costs of the learning procedure it is convenient to exploit the information that is already available rather than collecting new data. Nevertheless, the incapability to augment the batch can lead the autonomous agents to develop far from optimal behaviours when the sampled experiences do not allow for a good estimate of the true distribution of the environment. Offline learning is the area of machine learning concerned with efficiently obtaining an optimal policy with a batch of previously collected experiences without further interaction with the environment. In this paper we adumbrate the ideas motivating the development of the state-of-the-art offline learning baselines. The listed methods consist in the introduction of epistemic uncertainty dependent constraints during the classical resolution of a Markov Decision Process, with and without function approximators, that aims to alleviate the bad effects of the distributional mismatch between the available samples and real world. We provide comments on the practical utility of the theoretical bounds that justify the application of these algorithms and suggest the utilization of Generative Adversarial Networks to estimate the distributional shift that affects all of the proposed model-free and model-based approaches.
summary: The training of autonomous agents often requires expensive and unsafe trial-and-error interactions with the environment. Nowadays several data sets containing recorded experiences of intelligent agents performing various tasks, spanning from the control of unmanned vehicles to human-robot interaction and medical applications are accessible on the internet. With the intention of limiting the costs of the learning procedure it is convenient to exploit the information that is already available rather than collecting new data. Nevertheless, the incapability to augment the batch can lead the autonomous agents to develop far from optimal behaviours when the sampled experiences do not allow for a good estimate of the true distribution of the environment. Offline learning is the area of machine learning concerned with efficiently obtaining an optimal policy with a batch of previously collected experiences without further interaction with the environment. In this paper we adumbrate the ideas motivating the development of the state-of-the-art offline learning baselines. The listed methods consist in the introduction of epistemic uncertainty dependent constraints during the classical resolution of a Markov Decision Process, with and without function approximators, that aims to alleviate the bad effects of the distributional mismatch between the available samples and real world. We provide comments on the practical utility of the theoretical bounds that justify the application of these algorithms and suggest the utilization of Generative Adversarial Networks to estimate the distributional shift that affects all of the proposed model-free and model-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 自主代理的训练通常需要与环境进行昂贵且不安全的试错交互。如今，包含智能代理执行各种任务的记录经验的多个数据集，从无人驾驶车辆的控制到人机交互和医疗应用，都可以在互联网上访问。为了限制学习过程的成本，利用现有的信息比收集新数据更方便。然而，当采样的经验无法很好地估计环境的真实分布时，无法增加批次可能会导致自主代理的行为远离最佳行为。离线学习是机器学习的一个领域，涉及利用之前收集的一批经验有效地获得最优策略，而无需与环境进一步交互。在本文中，我们概述了推动最先进的离线学习基线开发的想法。列出的方法包括在马尔可夫决策过程的经典解析过程中引入认知不确定性相关约束，无论有没有函数逼近器，其目的是减轻可用样本与现实世界之间分布不匹配的不良影响。我们对理论界限的实际效用进行了评论，证明这些算法的应用是合理的，并建议利用生成对抗网络来估计影响所有提出的无模型和基于模型的方法的分布变化。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了离线学习方法，旨在利用现有数据集训练最优策略，解决分布不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自主代理训练依赖昂贵且危险的试错交互，而现有数据集可降低学习成本，但分布不匹配可能导致次优策略，需通过离线学习解决。
AI.method: 通过引入认识不确定性约束的马尔可夫决策过程求解方法，并结合生成对抗网络估计分布偏移，以缓解分布不匹配问题。
AI.result: 分析了理论界限的实用性，并提出使用生成对抗网络来估计分布偏移，适用于无模型和基于模型的方法。
AI.conclusion: 离线学习能有效利用现有数据集训练最优策略，但需进一步研究以解决分布不匹配问题，生成对抗网络可能是一个有前景的工具。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了离线学习方法，旨在利用现有数据集训练最优策略，解决分布不匹配问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统自主代理训练依赖昂贵且危险的试错交互，而现有数据集可降低学习成本，但分布不匹配可能导致次优策略，需通过离线学习解决。
ai_content.method: 通过引入认识不确定性约束的马尔可夫决策过程求解方法，并结合生成对抗网络估计分布偏移，以缓解分布不匹配问题。
ai_content.result: 分析了理论界限的实用性，并提出使用生成对抗网络来估计分布偏移，适用于无模型和基于模型的方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 离线学习能有效利用现有数据集训练最优策略，但需进一步研究以解决分布不匹配问题，生成对抗网络可能是一个有前景的工具。

search_text: Offline Learning for Planning: A Summary 离线学习规划：总结 The training of autonomous agents often requires expensive and unsafe trial-and-error interactions with the environment. Nowadays several data sets containing recorded experiences of intelligent agents performing various tasks, spanning from the control of unmanned vehicles to human-robot interaction and medical applications are accessible on the internet. With the intention of limiting the costs of the learning procedure it is convenient to exploit the information that is already available rather than collecting new data. Nevertheless, the incapability to augment the batch can lead the autonomous agents to develop far from optimal behaviours when the sampled experiences do not allow for a good estimate of the true distribution of the environment. Offline learning is the area of machine learning concerned with efficiently obtaining an optimal policy with a batch of previously collected experiences without further interaction with the environment. In this paper we adumbrate the ideas motivating the development of the state-of-the-art offline learning baselines. The listed methods consist in the introduction of epistemic uncertainty dependent constraints during the classical resolution of a Markov Decision Process, with and without function approximators, that aims to alleviate the bad effects of the distributional mismatch between the available samples and real world. We provide comments on the practical utility of the theoretical bounds that justify the application of these algorithms and suggest the utilization of Generative Adversarial Networks to estimate the distributional shift that affects all of the proposed model-free and model-based approaches. 自主代理的训练通常需要与环境进行昂贵且不安全的试错交互。如今，包含智能代理执行各种任务的记录经验的多个数据集，从无人驾驶车辆的控制到人机交互和医疗应用，都可以在互联网上访问。为了限制学习过程的成本，利用现有的信息比收集新数据更方便。然而，当采样的经验无法很好地估计环境的真实分布时，无法增加批次可能会导致自主代理的行为远离最佳行为。离线学习是机器学习的一个领域，涉及利用之前收集的一批经验有效地获得最优策略，而无需与环境进一步交互。在本文中，我们概述了推动最先进的离线学习基线开发的想法。列出的方法包括在马尔可夫决策过程的经典解析过程中引入认知不确定性相关约束，无论有没有函数逼近器，其目的是减轻可用样本与现实世界之间分布不匹配的不良影响。我们对理论界限的实际效用进行了评论，证明这些算法的应用是合理的，并建议利用生成对抗网络来估计影响所有提出的无模型和基于模型的方法的分布变化。 本文综述了离线学习方法，旨在利用现有数据集训练最优策略，解决分布不匹配问题。 Giorgio Angelotti,Nicolas Drougard,Caroline Ponzoni Carvalho Chanel cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Benjin Zhu,Junqiang Huang,Zeming Li,Xiangyu Zhang,Jian Sun
title: EqCo: Equivalent Rules for Self-supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: EqCo：自监督对比学习的等效规则
abstract: In this paper, we propose EqCo (Equivalent Rules for Contrastive Learning) to make self-supervised learning irrelevant to the number of negative samples in the contrastive learning framework. Inspired by the InfoMax principle, we point that the margin term in contrastive loss needs to be adaptively scaled according to the number of negative pairs in order to keep steady mutual information bound and gradient magnitude. EqCo bridges the performance gap among a wide range of negative sample sizes, so that for the first time, we can use only a few negative pairs (e.g., 16 per query) to perform self-supervised contrastive training on large-scale vision datasets like ImageNet, while with almost no accuracy drop. This is quite a contrast to the widely used large batch training or memory bank mechanism in current practices. Equipped with EqCo, our simplified MoCo (SiMo) achieves comparable accuracy with MoCov2 on ImageNet (linear evaluation protocol) while only involves 16 negative pairs per query instead of 65536, suggesting that large quantities of negative samples is not a critical factor in contrastive learning frameworks.
summary: In this paper, we propose EqCo (Equivalent Rules for Contrastive Learning) to make self-supervised learning irrelevant to the number of negative samples in the contrastive learning framework. Inspired by the InfoMax principle, we point that the margin term in contrastive loss needs to be adaptively scaled according to the number of negative pairs in order to keep steady mutual information bound and gradient magnitude. EqCo bridges the performance gap among a wide range of negative sample sizes, so that for the first time, we can use only a few negative pairs (e.g., 16 per query) to perform self-supervised contrastive training on large-scale vision datasets like ImageNet, while with almost no accuracy drop. This is quite a contrast to the widely used large batch training or memory bank mechanism in current practices. Equipped with EqCo, our simplified MoCo (SiMo) achieves comparable accuracy with MoCov2 on ImageNet (linear evaluation protocol) while only involves 16 negative pairs per query instead of 65536, suggesting that large quantities of negative samples is not a critical factor in contrastive learning frameworks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了EqCo（对比学习的等效规则），使自监督学习与对比学习框架中的负样本数量无关。受 InfoMax 原理的启发，我们指出对比损失中的边际项需要根据负对的数量自适应缩放，以保持稳定的互信息边界和梯度幅度。 EqCo 弥合了各种负样本大小之间的性能差距，因此我们第一次可以仅使用几个负样本对（例如每个查询 16 个）对 ImageNet 等大规模视觉数据集进行自监督对比训练，同时几乎没有精度下降。这与当前实践中广泛使用的大批量训练或记忆库机制形成鲜明对比。配备 EqCo，我们的简化 MoCo (SiMo) 在 ImageNet（线性评估协议）上实现了与 MoCov2 相当的精度，同时每个查询仅涉及 16 个负对，而不是 65536 个，这表明大量负样本并不是对比学习框架中的关键因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EqCo方法，通过调整对比学习中的边距项，使自监督学习与负样本数量无关。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习框架依赖大量负样本（如65536个）以保持性能，但计算成本高且效率低。
AI.method: 基于InfoMax原理，动态缩放对比损失中的边距项，使互信息边界和梯度幅度保持稳定，减少对负样本数量的依赖。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，仅使用16个负样本即可达到与MoCov2相当的精度，验证了负样本数量并非关键因素。
AI.conclusion: EqCo证明了对比学习框架中无需依赖大量负样本，为简化训练流程提供了新思路。

title: Slip detection for grasp stabilisation with a multi-fingered tactile robot hand
title_zh: 使用多指触觉机器人手进行滑动检测以实现抓取稳定性
comment: Accepted into IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: Accepted into IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: Tactile sensing is used by humans when grasping to prevent us dropping objects. One key facet of tactile sensing is slip detection, which allows a gripper to know when a grasp is failing and take action to prevent an object being dropped. This study demonstrates the slip detection capabilities of the recently developed Tactile Model O (T-MO) by using support vector machines to detect slip and test multiple slip scenarios including responding to the onset of slip in real time with eleven different objects in various grasps. We demonstrate the benefits of slip detection in grasping by testing two real-world scenarios: adding weight to destabilise a grasp and using slip detection to lift up objects at the first attempt. The T-MO is able to detect when an object is slipping, react to stabilise the grasp and be deployed in real-world scenarios. This shows the T-MO is a suitable platform for autonomous grasping by using reliable slip detection to ensure a stable grasp in unstructured environments. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/wOwFHaiHuKY

We demonstrate the benefits of slip detection in grasping by testing two real-world scenarios: adding weight to destabilise a grasp and using slip detection to lift up objects at the first attempt. The T-MO is able to detect when an object is slipping, react to stabilise the grasp and be deployed in real-world scenarios. This shows the T-MO is a suitable platform for autonomous grasping by using reliable slip detection to ensure a stable grasp in unstructured environments. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/wOwFHaiHuKY
abstract_zh: 人类在抓握时使用触觉感应来防止掉落物体。触觉传感的一个关键方面是滑动检测，它可以让抓取器知道何时抓取失败，并采取措施防止物体掉落。这项研究展示了最近开发的触觉模型 O (T-MO) 的滑动检测功能，通过使用支持向量机来检测滑动并测试多个滑动场景，包括在不同的抓握中对 11 个不同物体实时响应滑动的发生。我们通过测试两个现实场景来展示滑动检测在抓取中的优势：增加重量以破坏抓取的稳定性，以及使用滑动检测在第一次尝试时举起物体。 T-MO 能够检测物体何时滑动，做出反应以稳定抓握并部署在现实场景中。这表明 T-MO 是一个适合自主抓取的平台，通过使用可靠的滑动检测来确保在非结构化环境中的稳定抓取。补充视频：https://youtu.be/wOwFHaiHuKY

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于多指触觉机械手的滑动检测方法，用于实现抓取稳定化。
AI.motivation: 人类通过触觉感知防止抓取物体掉落，机器人需类似能力以确保稳定抓取，尤其在非结构化环境中。
AI.method: 采用支持向量机（SVM）进行滑动检测，测试11种物体在不同抓取方式下的实时滑动响应，并验证两种实际场景。
AI.result: T-MO触觉机械手成功检测滑动并稳定抓取，有效应对重量增加和首次提升物体的挑战。
AI.conclusion: T-MO通过可靠滑动检测实现了非结构化环境下的稳定抓取，适合作为自主抓取的平台。

authors_text: Thomas Varsavsky,Mauricio Orbes-Arteaga,Carole H. Sudre,Mark S. Graham,Parashkev Nachev,M. Jorge Cardoso
title: Test-time Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 测试时无监督域适应
abstract: Convolutional neural networks trained on publicly available medical imaging datasets (source domain) rarely generalise to different scanners or acquisition protocols (target domain). This motivates the active field of domain adaptation. While some approaches to the problem require labeled data from the target domain, others adopt an unsupervised approach to domain adaptation (UDA). Evaluating UDA methods consists of measuring the model's ability to generalise to unseen data in the target domain. In this work, we argue that this is not as useful as adapting to the test set directly. We therefore propose an evaluation framework where we perform test-time UDA on each subject separately. We show that models adapted to a specific target subject from the target domain outperform a domain adaptation method which has seen more data of the target domain but not this specific target subject. This result supports the thesis that unsupervised domain adaptation should be used at test-time, even if only using a single target-domain subject

This motivates the active field of domain adaptation. While some approaches to the problem require labeled data from the target domain, others adopt an unsupervised approach to domain adaptation (UDA). Evaluating UDA methods consists of measuring the model's ability to generalise to unseen data in the target domain. In this work, we argue that this is not as useful as adapting to the test set directly. We therefore propose an evaluation framework where we perform test-time UDA on each subject separately. We show that models adapted to a specific target subject from the target domain outperform a domain adaptation method which has seen more data of the target domain but not this specific target subject. This result supports the thesis that unsupervised domain adaptation should be used at test-time, even if only using a single target-domain subject
abstract_zh: 在公开可用的医学成像数据集（源域）上训练的卷积神经网络很少泛化到不同的扫描仪或采集协议（目标域）。这激发了领域适应的活跃领域。虽然解决该问题的某些方法需要来自目标域的标记数据，但其他方法则采用无监督的域适应方法（UDA）。评估 UDA 方法包括测量模型泛化到目标域中未见过的数据的能力。在这项工作中，我们认为这不如直接适应测试集有用。因此，我们提出了一个评估框架，我们对每个主题分别进行测试时 UDA。我们表明，适应目标域中特定目标主题的模型优于域适应方法，后者看到了目标域的更多数据，但没有看到该特定目标主题。该结果支持这样的论点：即使仅使用单个目标域主题，也应在测试时使用无监督域适应

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种测试时无监督域适应框架，通过在测试阶段针对每个目标域受试者单独进行域适应，以提升模型在目标域上的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督域适应方法评估模型泛化能力时，仅依赖目标域未见数据的测试，而实际应用中直接适应测试集可能更有效。
AI.method: 在测试阶段对每个目标域受试者单独执行域适应，而非在训练阶段使用目标域数据。
AI.result: 针对特定目标受试者适应的模型性能优于使用更多目标域数据但未见过该受试者的方法。
AI.conclusion: 测试时无监督域适应应成为标准实践，即使仅使用单个目标域样本也能获得更优效果。

authors_text: Jiawei Liu,Huijie Fan,Qiang Wang,Wentao Li,Yandong Tang,Danbo Wang,Mingyi Zhou,Li Chen
title: Local Label Point Correction for Edge Detection of Overlapping Cervical Cells
title_zh: 用于重叠宫颈细胞边缘检测的局部标记点校正
comment: Published on Frontiers in Neuroinformatics. Official paper: https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fninf.2022.895290/full. Code and dataset: https://github.com/nachifur/LLPC
comments: Published on Frontiers in Neuroinformatics. Official paper: https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fninf.2022.895290/full. Code and dataset: https://github.com/nachifur/LLPC
abstract: Accurate labeling is essential for supervised deep learning methods. However, it is almost impossible to accurately and manually annotate thousands of images, which results in many labeling errors for most datasets. We proposes a local label point correction (LLPC) method to improve annotation quality for edge detection and image segmentation tasks. Our algorithm contains three steps: gradient-guided point correction, point interpolation and local point smoothing. We correct the labels of object contours by moving the annotated points to the pixel gradient peaks. This can improve the edge localization accuracy, but it also causes unsmooth contours due to the interference of image noise. Therefore, we design a point smoothing method based on local linear fitting to smooth the corrected edge. To verify the effectiveness of our LLPC, we construct a largest overlapping cervical cell edge detection dataset (CCEDD) with higher precision label corrected by our label correction method. Our LLPC only needs to set three parameters, but yields 30-40$\%$ average precision improvement on multiple networks. The qualitative and quantitative experimental results show that our LLPC can improve the quality of manual labels and the accuracy of overlapping cell edge detection. We hope that our study will give a strong boost to the development of the label correction for edge detection and image segmentation. We will release the dataset and code at https://github.com/nachifur/LLPC.
summary: Accurate labeling is essential for supervised deep learning methods. However, it is almost impossible to accurately and manually annotate thousands of images, which results in many labeling errors for most datasets. We proposes a local label point correction (LLPC) method to improve annotation quality for edge detection and image segmentation tasks. Our algorithm contains three steps: gradient-guided point correction, point interpolation and local point smoothing. We correct the labels of object contours by moving the annotated points to the pixel gradient peaks. This can improve the edge localization accuracy, but it also causes unsmooth contours due to the interference of image noise. Therefore, we design a point smoothing method based on local linear fitting to smooth the corrected edge. To verify the effectiveness of our LLPC, we construct a largest overlapping cervical cell edge detection dataset (CCEDD) with higher precision label corrected by our label correction method. Our LLPC only needs to set three parameters, but yields 30-40$\%$ average precision improvement on multiple networks. The qualitative and quantitative experimental results show that our LLPC can improve the quality of manual labels and the accuracy of overlapping cell edge detection. We hope that our study will give a strong boost to the development of the label correction for edge detection and image segmentation. We will release the dataset and code at https://github.com/nachifur/LLPC.
abstract_zh: 准确的标记对于监督深度学习方法至关重要。然而，准确地手动注释数千张图像几乎是不可能的，这导致大多数数据集出现许多标记错误。我们提出了一种局部标签点校正（LLPC）方法来提高边缘检测和图像分割任务的注释质量。我们的算法包含三个步骤：梯度引导点校正、点插值和局部点平滑。我们通过将注释点移动到像素梯度峰值来校正对象轮廓的标签。这可以提高边缘定位精度，但也会因图像噪声的干扰而导致轮廓不平滑。因此，我们设计了一种基于局部线性拟合的点平滑方法来平滑校正后的边缘。为了验证我们的 LLPC 的有效性，我们构建了最大的重叠宫颈细胞边缘检测数据集（CCEDD），并通过我们的标签校正方法校正了更高精度的标签。我们的 LLPC 只需要设置三个参数，但在多个网络上的平均精度提高了 30-40$\%$。定性和定量实验结果表明，我们的LLPC可以提高手动标记的质量和重叠细胞边缘检测的准确性。我们希望我们的研究能够有力推动边缘检测和图像分割标签校正的发展。我们将在 https://github.com/nachifur/LLPC 发布数据集和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种局部标签点校正方法（LLPC），用于提升重叠宫颈细胞边缘检测的标注质量。
AI.motivation: 监督学习方法依赖高质量标注，但手动标注大量图像存在误差，尤其在重叠细胞边缘检测中影响显著。
AI.method: LLPC包含三个步骤：梯度引导点校正、点插值和局部点平滑，通过移动标注点至梯度峰值优化边缘定位，并利用局部线性拟合平滑噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在多个网络中实现30-40%平均精度提升，构建了高精度标注的宫颈细胞边缘检测数据集（CCEDD）。
AI.conclusion: LLPC有效提升人工标注质量与重叠细胞边缘检测精度，为边缘检测和图像分割的标签校正提供新思路，并开源数据集与代码。

authors_text: Uchenna Akujuobi,Jun Chen,Mohamed Elhoseiny,Michael Spranger,Xiangliang Zhang
title: Temporal Positive-unlabeled Learning for Biomedical Hypothesis Generation via Risk Estimation
title_zh: 通过风险估计生成生物医学假设的时间正无标记学习
abstract: Understanding the relationships between biomedical terms like viruses, drugs, and symptoms is essential in the fight against diseases. Many attempts have been made to introduce the use of machine learning to the scientific process of hypothesis generation(HG), which refers to the discovery of meaningful implicit connections between biomedical terms. However, most existing methods fail to truly capture the temporal dynamics of scientific term relations and also assume unobserved connections to be irrelevant (i.e., in a positive-negative (PN) learning setting). To break these limits, we formulate this HG problem as future connectivity prediction task on a dynamic attributed graph via positive-unlabeled (PU) learning. Then, the key is to capture the temporal evolution of node pair (term pair) relations from just the positive and unlabeled data. We propose a variational inference model to estimate the positive prior, and incorporate it in the learning of node pair embeddings, which are then used for link prediction. Experiment results on real-world biomedical term relationship datasets and case study analyses on a COVID-19 dataset validate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: Understanding the relationships between biomedical terms like viruses, drugs, and symptoms is essential in the fight against diseases. Many attempts have been made to introduce the use of machine learning to the scientific process of hypothesis generation(HG), which refers to the discovery of meaningful implicit connections between biomedical terms. However, most existing methods fail to truly capture the temporal dynamics of scientific term relations and also assume unobserved connections to be irrelevant (i.e., in a positive-negative (PN) learning setting). To break these limits, we formulate this HG problem as future connectivity prediction task on a dynamic attributed graph via positive-unlabeled (PU) learning. Then, the key is to capture the temporal evolution of node pair (term pair) relations from just the positive and unlabeled data. We propose a variational inference model to estimate the positive prior, and incorporate it in the learning of node pair embeddings, which are then used for link prediction. Experiment results on real-world biomedical term relationship datasets and case study analyses on a COVID-19 dataset validate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 了解病毒、药物和症状等生物医学术语之间的关系对于对抗疾病至关重要。人们已经做出了许多尝试，将机器学习的使用引入假设生成（HG）的科学过程，这是指发现生物医学术语之间有意义的隐含联系。然而，大多数现有方法无法真正捕捉科学术语关系的时间动态，并且还假设未观察到的联系是不相关的（即在正负（PN）学习环境中）。为了打破这些限制，我们通过正未标记（PU）学习将这个 HG 问题表述为动态属性图上的未来连接预测任务。然后，关键是从正数据和未标记数据中捕获节点对（术语对）关系的时间演化。我们提出了一种变分推理模型来估计正先验，并将其纳入节点对嵌入的学习中，然后将其用于链接预测。现实世界生物医学术语关系数据集的实验结果和 COVID-19 数据集的案例研究分析验证了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间正样本-未标记样本学习的生物医学假设生成方法，通过动态属性图上的未来连接预测任务建模术语关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能捕捉科学术语关系的时序动态性，且将未观察到的连接视为无关（正负学习设定），导致假设生成效果受限。
AI.method: 将假设生成建模为动态属性图的未来连接预测问题，提出变分推理模型估计正样本先验，并将其整合到节点对嵌入学习中用于链接预测。
AI.result: 在真实生物医学术语关系数据集及新冠数据集上的案例分析验证了该模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过时序正未标记学习与风险估计，模型能有效捕捉术语对关系的动态演化，提升生物医学假设生成的准确性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间正样本-未标记样本学习的生物医学假设生成方法，通过动态属性图上的未来连接预测任务建模术语关系。

search_text: Temporal Positive-unlabeled Learning for Biomedical Hypothesis Generation via Risk Estimation 通过风险估计生成生物医学假设的时间正无标记学习 Understanding the relationships between biomedical terms like viruses, drugs, and symptoms is essential in the fight against diseases. Many attempts have been made to introduce the use of machine learning to the scientific process of hypothesis generation(HG), which refers to the discovery of meaningful implicit connections between biomedical terms. However, most existing methods fail to truly capture the temporal dynamics of scientific term relations and also assume unobserved connections to be irrelevant (i.e., in a positive-negative (PN) learning setting). To break these limits, we formulate this HG problem as future connectivity prediction task on a dynamic attributed graph via positive-unlabeled (PU) learning. Then, the key is to capture the temporal evolution of node pair (term pair) relations from just the positive and unlabeled data. We propose a variational inference model to estimate the positive prior, and incorporate it in the learning of node pair embeddings, which are then used for link prediction. Experiment results on real-world biomedical term relationship datasets and case study analyses on a COVID-19 dataset validate the effectiveness of the proposed model. 了解病毒、药物和症状等生物医学术语之间的关系对于对抗疾病至关重要。人们已经做出了许多尝试，将机器学习的使用引入假设生成（HG）的科学过程，这是指发现生物医学术语之间有意义的隐含联系。然而，大多数现有方法无法真正捕捉科学术语关系的时间动态，并且还假设未观察到的联系是不相关的（即在正负（PN）学习环境中）。为了打破这些限制，我们通过正未标记（PU）学习将这个 HG 问题表述为动态属性图上的未来连接预测任务。然后，关键是从正数据和未标记数据中捕获节点对（术语对）关系的时间演化。我们提出了一种变分推理模型来估计正先验，并将其纳入节点对嵌入的学习中，然后将其用于链接预测。现实世界生物医学术语关系数据集的实验结果和 COVID-19 数据集的案例研究分析验证了所提出模型的有效性。 本文提出一种基于时间正样本-未标记样本学习的生物医学假设生成方法，通过动态属性图上的未来连接预测任务建模术语关系。 Uchenna Akujuobi,Jun Chen,Mohamed Elhoseiny,Michael Spranger,Xiangliang Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Best Buddies Registration for Point Clouds
title_zh: 点云好友注册
abstract: We propose new, and robust, loss functions for the point cloud registration problem. Our loss functions are inspired by the Best Buddies Similarity (BBS) measure that counts the number of mutual nearest neighbors between two point sets. This measure has been shown to be robust to outliers and missing data in the case of template matching for images. We present several algorithms, collectively named Best Buddy Registration (BBR), where each algorithm consists of optimizing one of these loss functions with Adam gradient descent. The loss functions differ in several ways, including the distance function used (point-to-point vs. point-to-plane), and how the BBS measure is combined with the actual distances between pairs of points. Experiments on various data sets, both synthetic and real, demonstrate the effectiveness of the BBR algorithms, showing that they are quite robust to noise, outliers, and distractors, and cope well with extremely sparse point clouds. One variant, BBR-F, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy in the registration of automotive lidar scans taken up to several seconds apart, from the KITTI and Apollo-Southbay datasets.
summary: We propose new, and robust, loss functions for the point cloud registration problem. Our loss functions are inspired by the Best Buddies Similarity (BBS) measure that counts the number of mutual nearest neighbors between two point sets. This measure has been shown to be robust to outliers and missing data in the case of template matching for images. We present several algorithms, collectively named Best Buddy Registration (BBR), where each algorithm consists of optimizing one of these loss functions with Adam gradient descent. The loss functions differ in several ways, including the distance function used (point-to-point vs. point-to-plane), and how the BBS measure is combined with the actual distances between pairs of points. Experiments on various data sets, both synthetic and real, demonstrate the effectiveness of the BBR algorithms, showing that they are quite robust to noise, outliers, and distractors, and cope well with extremely sparse point clouds. One variant, BBR-F, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy in the registration of automotive lidar scans taken up to several seconds apart, from the KITTI and Apollo-Southbay datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们为点云配准问题提出了新的、鲁棒的损失函数。我们的损失函数受到最佳伙伴相似度（BBS）度量的启发，该度量计算两个点集之间相互最近的邻居的数量。在图像模板匹配的情况下，该方法已被证明对异常值和缺失数据具有鲁棒性。我们提出了几种算法，统称为最佳好友注册（BBR），其中每种算法都包括使用 Adam 梯度下降来优化这些损失函数之一。损失函数在几个方面有所不同，包括使用的距离函数（点对点与点对平面），以及 BBS 测量如何与点对之间的实际距离相结合。对各种合成数据集和真实数据集的实验证明了 BBR 算法的有效性，表明它们对噪声、异常值和干扰因素具有相当的鲁棒性，并且可以很好地应对极其稀疏的点云。其中一种变体 BBR-F 在注册汽车激光雷达扫描时达到了最先进的精度，该扫描间隔长达几秒，来自 KITTI 和 Apollo-Southbay 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Best Buddy Registration (BBR)的点云配准方法，通过改进的损失函数提高配准鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统点云配准方法对噪声、离群点和稀疏数据敏感，需开发更鲁棒的配准算法以应对实际应用场景。
AI.method: 基于Best Buddies Similarity (BBS)度量设计多种损失函数，结合点到点/点到面距离计算，使用Adam梯度下降优化，形成BBR算法族。
AI.result: 实验表明BBR算法在合成与真实数据集（如KITTI）中均表现优异，尤其BBR-F变体在稀疏点云和大时间间隔激光雷达数据中达到SOTA精度。
AI.conclusion: BBR方法通过融合BBS度量与距离损失，有效提升了点云配准的鲁棒性，适用于自动驾驶等实际场景。

Our loss functions are inspired by the Best Buddies Similarity (BBS) measure that counts the number of mutual nearest neighbors between two point sets. This measure has been shown to be robust to outliers and missing data in the case of template matching for images. The loss functions differ in several ways, including the distance function used (point-to-point vs. point-to-plane), and how the BBS measure is combined with the actual distances between pairs of points. One variant, BBR-F, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy in the registration of automotive lidar scans taken up to several seconds apart, from the KITTI and Apollo-Southbay datasets. 我们为点云配准问题提出了新的、鲁棒的损失函数。我们的损失函数受到最佳伙伴相似度（BBS）度量的启发，该度量计算两个点集之间相互最近的邻居的数量。在图像模板匹配的情况下，该方法已被证明对异常值和缺失数据具有鲁棒性。我们提出了几种算法，统称为最佳好友注册（BBR），其中每种算法都包括使用 Adam 梯度下降来优化这些损失函数之一。损失函数在几个方面有所不同，包括使用的距离函数（点对点与点对平面），以及 BBS 测量如何与点对之间的实际距离相结合。对各种合成数据集和真实数据集的实验证明了 BBR 算法的有效性，表明它们对噪声、异常值和干扰因素具有相当的鲁棒性，并且可以很好地应对极其稀疏的点云。其中一种变体 BBR-F 在注册汽车激光雷达扫描时达到了最先进的精度，该扫描间隔长达几秒，来自 KITTI 和 Apollo-Southbay 数据集。 本文提出一种名为Best Buddy Registration (BBR)的点云配准方法，通过改进的损失函数提高配准鲁棒性。 Amnon Drory,Tal Shomer,Shai Avidan,Raja Giryes cs.CV

title: Semantics through Time: Semi-supervised Segmentation of Aerial Videos with Iterative Label Propagation
title_zh: 随时间的语义：利用迭代标签传播对航空视频进行半监督分割
comment: Accepted as oral presentation at Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV), 2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1910.10026
comments: Accepted as oral presentation at Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV), 2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1910.10026
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a crucial task for robot navigation and safety. However, current supervised methods require a large amount of pixelwise annotations to yield accurate results. Labeling is a tedious and time consuming process that has hampered progress in low altitude UAV applications. This paper makes an important step towards automatic annotation by introducing SegProp, a novel iterative flow-based method, with a direct connection to spectral clustering in space and time, to propagate the semantic labels to frames that lack human annotations. The labels are further used in semi-supervised learning scenarios. Motivated by the lack of a large video aerial dataset, we also introduce Ruralscapes, a new dataset with high resolution (4K) images and manually-annotated dense labels every 50 frames - the largest of its kind, to the best of our knowledge. Our novel SegProp automatically annotates the remaining unlabeled 98% of frames with an accuracy exceeding 90% (F-measure), significantly outperforming other state-of-the-art label propagation methods. Moreover, when integrating other methods as modules inside SegProp's iterative label propagation loop, we achieve a significant boost over the baseline labels. Finally, we test SegProp in a full semi-supervised setting: we train several state-of-the-art deep neural networks on the SegProp-automatically-labeled training frames and test them on completely novel videos. We convincingly demonstrate, every time, a significant improvement over the supervised scenario.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a crucial task for robot navigation and safety. However, current supervised methods require a large amount of pixelwise annotations to yield accurate results. Labeling is a tedious and time consuming process that has hampered progress in low altitude UAV applications. This paper makes an important step towards automatic annotation by introducing SegProp, a novel iterative flow-based method, with a direct connection to spectral clustering in space and time, to propagate the semantic labels to frames that lack human annotations. The labels are further used in semi-supervised learning scenarios. Motivated by the lack of a large video aerial dataset, we also introduce Ruralscapes, a new dataset with high resolution (4K) images and manually-annotated dense labels every 50 frames - the largest of its kind, to the best of our knowledge. Our novel SegProp automatically annotates the remaining unlabeled 98% of frames with an accuracy exceeding 90% (F-measure), significantly outperforming other state-of-the-art label propagation methods. Finally, we test SegProp in a full semi-supervised setting: we train several state-of-the-art deep neural networks on the SegProp-automatically-labeled training frames and test them on completely novel videos. We convincingly demonstrate, every time, a significant improvement over the supervised scenario.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是机器人导航和安全的一项关键任务。然而，当前的监督方法需要大量的像素注释才能产生准确的结果。标记是一个繁琐且耗时的过程，阻碍了低空无人机应用的进展。本文通过引入 SegProp（一种基于迭代流的新颖方法），与空间和时间上的谱聚类直接连接，将语义标签传播到缺乏人工注释的帧，向自动注释迈出了重要的一步。这些标签进一步用于半监督学习场景。由于缺乏大型视频航空数据集，我们还引入了 Ruralscapes，这是一个新的数据集，包含高分辨率 (4K) 图像和每 50 帧手动注释的密集标签 - 据我们所知，这是同类数据集中最大的。我们新颖的 SegProp 自动注释剩余的 98% 的未标记帧，准确度超过 90%（F 测量），显着优于其他最先进的标签传播方法。此外，当将其他方法作为模块集成到 SegProp 的迭代标签传播循环中时，我们实现了对基线标签的显着提升。最后，我们在完全半监督的环境中测试 SegProp：我们在 SegProp 自动标记的训练帧上训练几个最先进的深度神经网络，并在完全新颖的视频上测试它们。我们每次都令人信服地证明，比监督场景有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SegProp方法，通过迭代标签传播实现航拍视频的半监督语义分割，并构建Ruralscapes数据集以减少人工标注需求。
AI.motivation: 现有监督方法依赖大量像素级标注，而航拍视频标注过程繁琐且阻碍低空无人机应用发展，亟需自动化标注方案。
AI.method: 开发基于光流的迭代标签传播算法SegProp，结合时空谱聚类实现标签传播；构建包含4K高清图像和每50帧人工标注的Ruralscapes数据集。
AI.result: SegProp在98%未标注帧上达到90%+的F值准确率，显著优于现有方法；集成其他算法模块后性能进一步提升，半监督训练下模型表现超越全监督基线。
AI.conclusion: SegProp有效降低人工标注依赖，提升航拍视频语义分割精度，为无人机自主导航提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Semantics through Time: Semi-supervised Segmentation of Aerial Videos with Iterative Label Propagation 随时间的语义：利用迭代标签传播对航空视频进行半监督分割 Semantic segmentation is a crucial task for robot navigation and safety. However, current supervised methods require a large amount of pixelwise annotations to yield accurate results. Labeling is a tedious and time consuming process that has hampered progress in low altitude UAV applications. This paper makes an important step towards automatic annotation by introducing SegProp, a novel iterative flow-based method, with a direct connection to spectral clustering in space and time, to propagate the semantic labels to frames that lack human annotations. The labels are further used in semi-supervised learning scenarios. Motivated by the lack of a large video aerial dataset, we also introduce Ruralscapes, a new dataset with high resolution (4K) images and manually-annotated dense labels every 50 frames - the largest of its kind, to the best of our knowledge. Our novel SegProp automatically annotates the remaining unlabeled 98% of frames with an accuracy exceeding 90% (F-measure), significantly outperforming other state-of-the-art label propagation methods. Moreover, when integrating other methods as modules inside SegProp's iterative label propagation loop, we achieve a significant boost over the baseline labels. Finally, we test SegProp in a full semi-supervised setting: we train several state-of-the-art deep neural networks on the SegProp-automatically-labeled training frames and test them on completely novel videos. We convincingly demonstrate, every time, a significant improvement over the supervised scenario. 语义分割是机器人导航和安全的一项关键任务。然而，当前的监督方法需要大量的像素注释才能产生准确的结果。标记是一个繁琐且耗时的过程，阻碍了低空无人机应用的进展。本文通过引入 SegProp（一种基于迭代流的新颖方法），与空间和时间上的谱聚类直接连接，将语义标签传播到缺乏人工注释的帧，向自动注释迈出了重要的一步。这些标签进一步用于半监督学习场景。由于缺乏大型视频航空数据集，我们还引入了 Ruralscapes，这是一个新的数据集，包含高分辨率 (4K) 图像和每 50 帧手动注释的密集标签 - 据我们所知，这是同类数据集中最大的。我们新颖的 SegProp 自动注释剩余的 98% 的未标记帧，准确度超过 90%（F 测量），显着优于其他最先进的标签传播方法。此外，当将其他方法作为模块集成到 SegProp 的迭代标签传播循环中时，我们实现了对基线标签的显着提升。最后，我们在完全半监督的环境中测试 SegProp：我们在 SegProp 自动标记的训练帧上训练几个最先进的深度神经网络，并在完全新颖的视频上测试它们。我们每次都令人信服地证明，比监督场景有显着改进。 本文提出SegProp方法，通过迭代标签传播实现航拍视频的半监督语义分割，并构建Ruralscapes数据集以减少人工标注需求。 Alina Marcu,Vlad Licaret,Dragos Costea,Marius Leordeanu cs.CV

authors_text: Sunandita Patra,James Mason,Malik Ghallab,Dana Nau,Paolo Traverso
title: Deliberative Acting, Online Planning and Learning with Hierarchical Operational Models
title_zh: 通过分层运营模型进行深思熟虑的行动、在线规划和学习
comment: Published in Artificial Intelligence (AIJ). Please cite as: Sunandita Patra, James Mason, Malik Ghallab, Dana Nau, Paolo Traverso. Deliberative Acting, Planning and Learning with Hierarchical Operational Models. Artificial Intelligence, Elsevier, 2021, 299, pp.103523. 10.1016/j.artint.2021.103523. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.03932
comments: Published in Artificial Intelligence (AIJ). Please cite as: Sunandita Patra, James Mason, Malik Ghallab, Dana Nau, Paolo Traverso. Deliberative Acting, Planning and Learning with Hierarchical Operational Models. Artificial Intelligence, Elsevier, 2021, 299, pp.103523. 10.1016/j.artint.2021.103523. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.03932
abstract: In AI research, synthesizing a plan of action has typically used descriptive models of the actions that abstractly specify what might happen as a result of an action, and are tailored for efficiently computing state transitions. However, executing the planned actions has needed operational models, in which rich computational control structures and closed-loop online decision-making are used to specify how to perform an action in a nondeterministic execution context, react to events and adapt to an unfolding situation. Deliberative actors, which integrate acting and planning, have typically needed to use both of these models together -- which causes problems when attempting to develop the different models, verify their consistency, and smoothly interleave acting and planning. As an alternative, we define and implement an integrated acting and planning system in which both planning and acting use the same operational models. These rely on hierarchical task-oriented refinement methods offering rich control structures. The acting component, called Reactive Acting Engine (RAE), is inspired by the well-known PRS system. At each decision step, RAE can get advice from a planner for a near-optimal choice with respect to a utility function. The anytime planner uses a UCT-like Monte Carlo Tree Search procedure, called UPOM, whose rollouts are simulations of the actor's operational models. We also present learning strategies for use with RAE and UPOM that acquire, from online acting experiences and/or simulated planning results, a mapping from decision contexts to method instances as well as a heuristic function to guide UPOM. We demonstrate the asymptotic convergence of UPOM towards optimal methods in static domains, and show experimentally that UPOM and the learning strategies significantly improve the acting efficiency and robustness.
summary: In AI research, synthesizing a plan of action has typically used descriptive models of the actions that abstractly specify what might happen as a result of an action, and are tailored for efficiently computing state transitions. However, executing the planned actions has needed operational models, in which rich computational control structures and closed-loop online decision-making are used to specify how to perform an action in a nondeterministic execution context, react to events and adapt to an unfolding situation. Deliberative actors, which integrate acting and planning, have typically needed to use both of these models together -- which causes problems when attempting to develop the different models, verify their consistency, and smoothly interleave acting and planning. As an alternative, we define and implement an integrated acting and planning system in which both planning and acting use the same operational models. These rely on hierarchical task-oriented refinement methods offering rich control structures. The acting component, called Reactive Acting Engine (RAE), is inspired by the well-known PRS system. At each decision step, RAE can get advice from a planner for a near-optimal choice with respect to a utility function. The anytime planner uses a UCT-like Monte Carlo Tree Search procedure, called UPOM, whose rollouts are simulations of the actor's operational models. We also present learning strategies for use with RAE and UPOM that acquire, from online acting experiences and/or simulated planning results, a mapping from decision contexts to method instances as well as a heuristic function to guide UPOM. We demonstrate the asymptotic convergence of UPOM towards optimal methods in static domains, and show experimentally that UPOM and the learning strategies significantly improve the acting efficiency and robustness.
abstract_zh: 在人工智能研究中，综合行动计划通常使用行动的描述性模型，这些模型抽象地指定行动可能会发生什么，并且是为有效计算状态转换而定制的。然而，执行计划的行动需要操作模型，其中丰富的计算控制结构和闭环在线决策用于指定如何在不确定的执行上下文中执行操作、对事件做出反应并适应不断发展的情况。将表演和规划结合起来的深思熟虑的演员通常需要同时使用这两种模型——这在尝试开发不同模型、验证其一致性以及顺利地交织表演和规划时会出现问题。作为替代方案，我们定义并实施集成的行动和规划系统，其中规划和行动使用相同的操作模型。这些依赖于分层的面向任务的细化方法，提供丰富的控制结构。该动作组件称为反应式动作引擎 (RAE)，其灵感来自于著名的 PRS 系统。在每个决策步骤中，RAE 都可以从规划者那里获取关于效用函数的近乎最优选择的建议。随时规划器使用类似于 UCT 的蒙特卡罗树搜索过程（称为 UPOM），其推出是对参与者操作模型的模拟。我们还提出了与 RAE 和 UPOM 一起使用的学习策略，这些策略从在线行动经验和/或模拟规划结果中获取从决策上下文到方法实例的映射以及指导 UPOM 的启发式函数。我们证明了 UPOM 在静态域中向最优方法的渐近收敛，并通过实验证明 UPOM 和学习策略显着提高了执行效率和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成计划与行动的系统，通过统一的操作模型解决传统AI中描述性模型与操作性模型分离的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统AI中计划与执行依赖不同模型，导致模型开发、一致性验证及行动与计划的协同困难。
AI.method: 基于分层操作模型设计集成系统，包含反应式行动引擎（RAE）与基于UCT的UPOM规划器，并结合在线学习策略优化决策上下文映射与启发式函数。
AI.result: 实验表明UPOM在静态领域收敛至最优方法，且学习策略显著提升行动效率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 统一操作模型与学习策略为AI中的计划与行动提供了高效、鲁棒的解决方案，推动了分层任务规划的发展。

title: Improved Submodular Secretary Problem with Shortlists
title_zh: 改进的子模秘书问题与候选名单
abstract: First, for the for the submodular $k$-secretary problem with shortlists [1], we provide a near optimal $1-1/e-ε$ approximation using shortlist of size $O(k poly(1/ε))$. In particular, we improve the size of shortlist used in \cite{us} from $O(k 2^{poly(1/ε)})$ to $O(k poly(1/ε))$. As a result, we provide a near optimal approximation algorithm for random-order streaming of monotone submodular functions under cardinality constraints, using memory $O(k poly(1/ε))$. It exponentially improves the running time and memory of \cite{us} in terms of $1/ε$. Next we generalize the problem to matroid constraints, which we refer to as submodular matroid secretary problem with shortlists. It is a variant of the \textit{matroid secretary problem} \cite{feldman2014simple}, in which the algorithm is allowed to have a shortlist. We design an algorithm that achieves a $\frac{1}{2}(1-1/e^2 -ε)$ competitive ratio for any constant $ε>0$, using a shortlist of size $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$. Moreover, we generalize our results to the case of $p$-matchoid constraints and give a $\frac{1}{p+1}(1-1/e^{p+1}-ε)$ approximation using shortlist of size $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$. It asymptotically approaches the best known offline guarantee $\frac{1}{p+1}$ [22]. Furthermore, we show that our algorithms can be implemented in the streaming setting using $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ memory.
summary: First, for the for the submodular $k$-secretary problem with shortlists [1], we provide a near optimal $1-1/e-ε$ approximation using shortlist of size $O(k poly(1/ε))$. In particular, we improve the size of shortlist used in \cite{us} from $O(k 2^{poly(1/ε)})$ to $O(k poly(1/ε))$. As a result, we provide a near optimal approximation algorithm for random-order streaming of monotone submodular functions under cardinality constraints, using memory $O(k poly(1/ε))$. It exponentially improves the running time and memory of \cite{us} in terms of $1/ε$. Next we generalize the problem to matroid constraints, which we refer to as submodular matroid secretary problem with shortlists. It is a variant of the \textit{matroid secretary problem} \cite{feldman2014simple}, in which the algorithm is allowed to have a shortlist. We design an algorithm that achieves a $\frac{1}{2}(1-1/e^2 -ε)$ competitive ratio for any constant $ε>0$, using a shortlist of size $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$. Moreover, we generalize our results to the case of $p$-matchoid constraints and give a $\frac{1}{p+1}(1-1/e^{p+1}-ε)$ approximation using shortlist of size $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$. It asymptotically approaches the best known offline guarantee $\frac{1}{p+1}$ [22]. Furthermore, we show that our algorithms can be implemented in the streaming setting using $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ memory.
abstract_zh: 首先，对于具有入围名单的子模 $k$ 秘书问题 [1]，我们使用大小为 $O(k poly(1/ε))$ 的入围名单提供近乎最优的 $1-1/e-ε$ 近似值。特别是，我们将 \cite{us} 中使用的入围名单的大小从 $O(k 2^{poly(1/ε)})$ 提高到 $O(k poly(1/ε))$。因此，我们使用内存 $O(k poly(1/ε))$ 在基数约束下为单调子模函数的随机顺序流提供近乎最优的近似算法。它以 $1/ε$ 为单位，指数级地提高了 \cite{us} 的运行时间和内存。接下来，我们将问题推广到拟阵约束，我们将其称为带有入围名单的子模拟阵秘书问题。它是 \textit{matroid 秘书问题} \cite{feldman2014simple} 的一个变体，其中允许算法有一个候选名单。我们设计了一种算法，使用大小为 $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ 的入围名单，对于任何常数 $ε>0$ 都能实现 $\frac{1}{2}(1-1/e^2 -ε)$ 竞争比。此外，我们将结果推广到 $p$-matchoid 约束的情况，并使用大小为 $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ 的候选列表给出 $\frac{1}{p+1}(1-1/e^{p+1}-ε)$ 近似值。它渐近地接近最著名的离线保证 $\frac{1}{p+1}$ [22]。此外，我们表明我们的算法可以使用 $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ 内存在流设置中实现。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了子模k秘书问题的短名单算法，提出了更优的近似比并扩展到拟阵约束场景。
AI.motivation: 现有子模秘书问题算法在短名单规模和近似比之间存在权衡，需在随机顺序流模型下提升效率并扩展到更通用的约束条件。
AI.method: 设计基于短名单的算法，通过优化短名单规模与筛选策略，在拟阵和p-匹配约束下结合贪心思想实现近似比提升。
AI.result: 在单调子模函数下达到1-1/e-ε近似比，短名单规模降至O(k poly(1/ε))；拟阵约束下实现1/2(1-1/e²-ε)近似比，且适用于流式计算。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在保持近似比的同时显著降低内存需求，为大规模子模优化问题提供了高效流式解决方案。

tldr: 本文改进了子模k秘书问题的短名单算法，提出了更优的近似比并扩展到拟阵约束场景。
motivation: 现有子模秘书问题算法在短名单规模和近似比之间存在权衡，需在随机顺序流模型下提升效率并扩展到更通用的约束条件。
method: 设计基于短名单的算法，通过优化短名单规模与筛选策略，在拟阵和p-匹配约束下结合贪心思想实现近似比提升。
result: 在单调子模函数下达到1-1/e-ε近似比，短名单规模降至O(k poly(1/ε))；拟阵约束下实现1/2(1-1/e²-ε)近似比，且适用于流式计算。
conclusion: 提出的算法在保持近似比的同时显著降低内存需求，为大规模子模优化问题提供了高效流式解决方案。
search_text: Improved Submodular Secretary Problem with Shortlists 改进的子模秘书问题与候选名单 First, for the for the submodular $k$-secretary problem with shortlists [1], we provide a near optimal $1-1/e-ε$ approximation using shortlist of size $O(k poly(1/ε))$. In particular, we improve the size of shortlist used in \cite{us} from $O(k 2^{poly(1/ε)})$ to $O(k poly(1/ε))$. As a result, we provide a near optimal approximation algorithm for random-order streaming of monotone submodular functions under cardinality constraints, using memory $O(k poly(1/ε))$. It exponentially improves the running time and memory of \cite{us} in terms of $1/ε$. Next we generalize the problem to matroid constraints, which we refer to as submodular matroid secretary problem with shortlists. It is a variant of the \textit{matroid secretary problem} \cite{feldman2014simple}, in which the algorithm is allowed to have a shortlist. We design an algorithm that achieves a $\frac{1}{2}(1-1/e^2 -ε)$ competitive ratio for any constant $ε>0$, using a shortlist of size $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$. Moreover, we generalize our results to the case of $p$-matchoid constraints and give a $\frac{1}{p+1}(1-1/e^{p+1}-ε)$ approximation using shortlist of size $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$. It asymptotically approaches the best known offline guarantee $\frac{1}{p+1}$ [22]. Furthermore, we show that our algorithms can be implemented in the streaming setting using $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ memory. 首先，对于具有入围名单的子模 $k$ 秘书问题 [1]，我们使用大小为 $O(k poly(1/ε))$ 的入围名单提供近乎最优的 $1-1/e-ε$ 近似值。特别是，我们将 \cite{us} 中使用的入围名单的大小从 $O(k 2^{poly(1/ε)})$ 提高到 $O(k poly(1/ε))$。因此，我们使用内存 $O(k poly(1/ε))$ 在基数约束下为单调子模函数的随机顺序流提供近乎最优的近似算法。它以 $1/ε$ 为单位，指数级地提高了 \cite{us} 的运行时间和内存。接下来，我们将问题推广到拟阵约束，我们将其称为带有入围名单的子模拟阵秘书问题。它是 \textit{matroid 秘书问题} \cite{feldman2014simple} 的一个变体，其中允许算法有一个候选名单。我们设计了一种算法，使用大小为 $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ 的入围名单，对于任何常数 $ε>0$ 都能实现 $\frac{1}{2}(1-1/e^2 -ε)$ 竞争比。此外，我们将结果推广到 $p$-matchoid 约束的情况，并使用大小为 $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ 的候选列表给出 $\frac{1}{p+1}(1-1/e^{p+1}-ε)$ 近似值。它渐近地接近最著名的离线保证 $\frac{1}{p+1}$ [22]。此外，我们表明我们的算法可以使用 $O(k poly(\frac{1}ε))$ 内存在流设置中实现。 本文改进了子模k秘书问题的短名单算法，提出了更优的近似比并扩展到拟阵约束场景。 Mohammad Shadravan cs.DS

authors_text: Jie Huang,Zilong Wang,Kevin Chen-Chuan Chang,Wen-mei Hwu,Jinjun Xiong
title: Exploring Semantic Capacity of Terms
title_zh: 探索术语的语义能力
abstract: We introduce and study semantic capacity of terms. For example, the semantic capacity of artificial intelligence is higher than that of linear regression since artificial intelligence possesses a broader meaning scope. Understanding semantic capacity of terms will help many downstream tasks in natural language processing. For this purpose, we propose a two-step model to investigate semantic capacity of terms, which takes a large text corpus as input and can evaluate semantic capacity of terms if the text corpus can provide enough co-occurrence information of terms. Extensive experiments in three fields demonstrate the effectiveness and rationality of our model compared with well-designed baselines and human-level evaluations.
summary: We introduce and study semantic capacity of terms. For example, the semantic capacity of artificial intelligence is higher than that of linear regression since artificial intelligence possesses a broader meaning scope. Understanding semantic capacity of terms will help many downstream tasks in natural language processing. For this purpose, we propose a two-step model to investigate semantic capacity of terms, which takes a large text corpus as input and can evaluate semantic capacity of terms if the text corpus can provide enough co-occurrence information of terms. Extensive experiments in three fields demonstrate the effectiveness and rationality of our model compared with well-designed baselines and human-level evaluations.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍并研究术语的语义能力。例如，人工智能的语义能力高于线性回归，因为人工智能具有更广泛的含义范围。了解术语的语义能力将有助于自然语言处理中的许多下游任务。为此，我们提出了一种两步模型来研究术语的语义容量，该模型以大型文本语料库作为输入，如果文本语料库能够提供足够的术语共现信息，则可以评估术语的语义容量。与精心设计的基线和人类水平的评估相比，在三个领域的广泛实验证明了我们的模型的有效性和合理性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种两步模型来评估术语的语义容量，以支持自然语言处理任务。
AI.motivation: 理解术语的语义容量有助于提升自然语言处理任务的效果，但缺乏有效的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出一个两步模型，利用大规模文本语料库中的术语共现信息来评估语义容量。
AI.result: 在三个领域的实验表明，该模型相比基线和人类评估具有有效性和合理性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能有效评估术语语义容量，为自然语言处理任务提供支持。
