authors_text: Hamid Sarmadi,Rafael Muñoz-Salinas,M. Álvaro Berbís,Antonio Luna,R. Medina-Carnicer
title: Joint Scene and Object Tracking for Cost-Effective Augmented Reality Assisted Patient Positioning in Radiation Therapy
title_zh: 联合场景和对象跟踪，实现经济高效的增强现实辅助放射治疗中的患者定位
abstract: BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVE: The research done in the field of Augmented Reality (AR) for patient positioning in radiation therapy is scarce. We propose an efficient and cost-effective algorithm for tracking the scene and the patient to interactively assist the patient's positioning process by providing visual feedback to the operator. Up to our knowledge, this is the first framework that can be employed for mobile interactive AR to guide patient positioning. METHODS: We propose a point cloud processing method that combined with a fiducial marker-mapper algorithm and the generalized ICP algorithm tracks the patient and the camera precisely and efficiently only using the CPU unit. The alignment between the 3D reference model and body marker map is calculated employing an efficient body reconstruction algorithm. RESULTS: Our quantitative evaluation shows that the proposed method achieves a translational and rotational error of 4.17 mm/0.82 deg at 9 fps. Furthermore, the qualitative results demonstrate the usefulness of our algorithm in patient positioning on different human subjects. CONCLUSION: Since our algorithm achieves a relatively high frame rate and accuracy employing a regular laptop (without the usage of a dedicated GPU), it is a very cost-effective AR-based patient positioning method. It also opens the way for other researchers by introducing a framework that could be improved upon for better mobile interactive AR patient positioning solutions in the future.
summary: BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVE: The research done in the field of Augmented Reality (AR) for patient positioning in radiation therapy is scarce. We propose an efficient and cost-effective algorithm for tracking the scene and the patient to interactively assist the patient's positioning process by providing visual feedback to the operator. Up to our knowledge, this is the first framework that can be employed for mobile interactive AR to guide patient positioning. METHODS: We propose a point cloud processing method that combined with a fiducial marker-mapper algorithm and the generalized ICP algorithm tracks the patient and the camera precisely and efficiently only using the CPU unit. The alignment between the 3D reference model and body marker map is calculated employing an efficient body reconstruction algorithm. RESULTS: Our quantitative evaluation shows that the proposed method achieves a translational and rotational error of 4.17 mm/0.82 deg at 9 fps. Furthermore, the qualitative results demonstrate the usefulness of our algorithm in patient positioning on different human subjects. CONCLUSION: Since our algorithm achieves a relatively high frame rate and accuracy employing a regular laptop (without the usage of a dedicated GPU), it is a very cost-effective AR-based patient positioning method. It also opens the way for other researchers by introducing a framework that could be improved upon for better mobile interactive AR patient positioning solutions in the future.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：用于放射治疗中患者定位的增强现实（AR）领域的研究很少。我们提出了一种高效且经济高效的算法来跟踪场景和患者，通过向操作员提供视觉反馈来交互式地协助患者的定位过程。据我们所知，这是第一个可用于移动交互式 AR 来指导患者定位的框架。方法：我们提出了一种点云处理方法，结合基准标记映射器算法和广义 ICP 算法，仅使用 CPU 单元即可精确有效地跟踪患者和摄像机。 3D 参考模型和身体标记图之间的对齐采用高效的身体重建算法进行计算。结果：我们的定量评估表明，所提出的方法在 9 fps 下实现了 4.17 毫米/0.82 度的平移和旋转误差。此外，定性结果证明了我们的算法在不同人类受试者的患者定位中的有用性。结论：由于我们的算法使用普通笔记本电脑（不使用专用 GPU）实现了相对较高的帧速率和精度，因此它是一种非常经济高效的基于 AR 的患者定位方法。它还通过引入一个框架为其他研究人员开辟了道路，该框架可以在未来进行改进，以获得更好的移动交互式 AR 患者定位解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于增强现实（AR）的低成本患者定位方法，通过联合场景和物体跟踪提供视觉反馈以辅助放射治疗中的患者定位。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在AR用于放射治疗患者定位方面较为匮乏，亟需一种高效且经济的算法来实现交互式定位指导。
AI.method: 结合点云处理、标志物映射算法和广义ICP算法，仅使用CPU单元实现患者与相机的精准跟踪，并通过高效人体重建算法计算三维参考模型与身体标记图的对齐。
AI.result: 定量评估显示该方法在9fps下达到4.17毫米/0.82度的平移和旋转误差，定性结果验证了其在不同人体受试者定位中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在普通笔记本电脑上实现高帧率与精度，是一种经济高效的AR定位方案，为未来移动交互式AR定位研究提供了可改进的框架。

authors_text: Po-Hsiang Yu,Sih-Sian Wu,Jan P. Klopp,Liang-Gee Chen,Shao-Yi Chien
title: Joint Pruning & Quantization for Extremely Sparse Neural Networks
title_zh: 极其稀疏神经网络的联合剪枝和量化
abstract: We investigate pruning and quantization for deep neural networks. Our goal is to achieve extremely high sparsity for quantized networks to enable implementation on low cost and low power accelerator hardware. In a practical scenario, there are particularly many applications for dense prediction tasks, hence we choose stereo depth estimation as target. We propose a two stage pruning and quantization pipeline and introduce a Taylor Score alongside a new fine-tuning mode to achieve extreme sparsity without sacrificing performance. Our evaluation does not only show that pruning and quantization should be investigated jointly, but also shows that almost 99% of memory demand can be cut while hardware costs can be reduced up to 99.9%. In addition, to compare with other works, we demonstrate that our pruning stage alone beats the state-of-the-art when applied to ResNet on CIFAR10 and ImageNet.
summary: We investigate pruning and quantization for deep neural networks. Our goal is to achieve extremely high sparsity for quantized networks to enable implementation on low cost and low power accelerator hardware. In a practical scenario, there are particularly many applications for dense prediction tasks, hence we choose stereo depth estimation as target. We propose a two stage pruning and quantization pipeline and introduce a Taylor Score alongside a new fine-tuning mode to achieve extreme sparsity without sacrificing performance. Our evaluation does not only show that pruning and quantization should be investigated jointly, but also shows that almost 99% of memory demand can be cut while hardware costs can be reduced up to 99.9%. In addition, to compare with other works, we demonstrate that our pruning stage alone beats the state-of-the-art when applied to ResNet on CIFAR10 and ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 我们研究深度神经网络的修剪和量化。我们的目标是实现量化网络的极高稀疏性，以便能够在低成本和低功耗加速器硬件上实现。在实际场景中，密集预测任务的应用特别多，因此我们选择立体深度估计作为目标。我们提出了一个两阶段修剪和量化管道，并引入了泰勒分数和新的微调模式，以在不牺牲性能的情况下实现极端稀疏。我们的评估不仅表明剪枝和量化应该联合研究，而且还表明可以削减几乎 99% 的内存需求，同时可以降低高达 99.9% 的硬件成本。此外，为了与其他作品进行比较，我们证明，当应用于 CIFAR10 和 ImageNet 上的 ResNet 时，我们的剪枝阶段就击败了最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合剪枝与量化方法，旨在实现极高稀疏度的神经网络，以适应低成本低功耗硬件加速器。
AI.motivation: 为满足密集预测任务在资源受限硬件上的部署需求，需通过联合优化剪枝与量化技术，在保证性能的同时实现极致模型压缩。
AI.method: 提出两阶段剪枝与量化流程，结合泰勒分数及新型微调模式，实现极稀疏网络而不牺牲性能。
AI.result: 内存需求减少99%，硬件成本降低99.9%，且剪枝阶段在ResNet上超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合剪枝与量化可显著降低资源消耗，同时保持模型性能，为高效部署提供新思路。

search_text: Joint Pruning & Quantization for Extremely Sparse Neural Networks 极其稀疏神经网络的联合剪枝和量化 We investigate pruning and quantization for deep neural networks. Our goal is to achieve extremely high sparsity for quantized networks to enable implementation on low cost and low power accelerator hardware. In a practical scenario, there are particularly many applications for dense prediction tasks, hence we choose stereo depth estimation as target. We propose a two stage pruning and quantization pipeline and introduce a Taylor Score alongside a new fine-tuning mode to achieve extreme sparsity without sacrificing performance. Our evaluation does not only show that pruning and quantization should be investigated jointly, but also shows that almost 99% of memory demand can be cut while hardware costs can be reduced up to 99.9%. In addition, to compare with other works, we demonstrate that our pruning stage alone beats the state-of-the-art when applied to ResNet on CIFAR10 and ImageNet. 我们研究深度神经网络的修剪和量化。我们的目标是实现量化网络的极高稀疏性，以便能够在低成本和低功耗加速器硬件上实现。在实际场景中，密集预测任务的应用特别多，因此我们选择立体深度估计作为目标。我们提出了一个两阶段修剪和量化管道，并引入了泰勒分数和新的微调模式，以在不牺牲性能的情况下实现极端稀疏。我们的评估不仅表明剪枝和量化应该联合研究，而且还表明可以削减几乎 99% 的内存需求，同时可以降低高达 99.9% 的硬件成本。此外，为了与其他作品进行比较，我们证明，当应用于 CIFAR10 和 ImageNet 上的 ResNet 时，我们的剪枝阶段就击败了最先进的技术。 本文提出了一种联合剪枝与量化方法，旨在实现极高稀疏度的神经网络，以适应低成本低功耗硬件加速器。 Po-Hsiang Yu,Sih-Sian Wu,Jan P. Klopp,Liang-Gee Chen,Shao-Yi Chien cs.CV

authors_text: Anh Tuan Nguyen,Mai Hoang Dao,Dat Quoc Nguyen
title: A Pilot Study of Text-to-SQL Semantic Parsing for Vietnamese
title_zh: 越南语文本到 SQL 语义解析的初步研究
abstract: Semantic parsing is an important NLP task. However, Vietnamese is a low-resource language in this research area. In this paper, we present the first public large-scale Text-to-SQL semantic parsing dataset for Vietnamese. We extend and evaluate two strong semantic parsing baselines EditSQL (Zhang et al., 2019) and IRNet (Guo et al., 2019) on our dataset. We compare the two baselines with key configurations and find that: automatic Vietnamese word segmentation improves the parsing results of both baselines; the normalized pointwise mutual information (NPMI) score (Bouma, 2009) is useful for schema linking; latent syntactic features extracted from a neural dependency parser for Vietnamese also improve the results; and the monolingual language model PhoBERT for Vietnamese (Nguyen and Nguyen, 2020) helps produce higher performances than the recent best multilingual language model XLM-R (Conneau et al., 2020).
summary: Semantic parsing is an important NLP task. However, Vietnamese is a low-resource language in this research area. In this paper, we present the first public large-scale Text-to-SQL semantic parsing dataset for Vietnamese. We extend and evaluate two strong semantic parsing baselines EditSQL (Zhang et al., 2019) and IRNet (Guo et al., 2019) on our dataset. We compare the two baselines with key configurations and find that: automatic Vietnamese word segmentation improves the parsing results of both baselines; the normalized pointwise mutual information (NPMI) score (Bouma, 2009) is useful for schema linking; latent syntactic features extracted from a neural dependency parser for Vietnamese also improve the results; and the monolingual language model PhoBERT for Vietnamese (Nguyen and Nguyen, 2020) helps produce higher performances than the recent best multilingual language model XLM-R (Conneau et al., 2020).
abstract_zh: 语义解析是 NLP 的一项重要任务。然而，越南语在该研究领域是一种资源匮乏的语言。在本文中，我们提出了第一个公开的大规模越南语文本到 SQL 语义解析数据集。我们在我们的数据集上扩展并评估了两个强大的语义解析基线 EditSQL (Zhang et al., 2019) 和 IRNet (Guo et al., 2019)。我们将两个基线与关键配置进行比较，发现： 自动越南语分词提高了两个基线的解析结果；标准化逐点互信息 (NPMI) 分数（Bouma，2009）对于模式链接很有用；从越南语神经依存解析器中提取的潜在句法特征也改善了结果；越南语单语言模型 PhoBERT（Nguyen 和 Nguyen，2020）比最近最好的多语言语言模型 XLM-R（Conneau 等人，2020）产生了更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了首个大规模越南语Text-to-SQL语义解析数据集，并评估了两种基线模型的性能改进方法。
AI.motivation: 越南语在语义解析领域属于低资源语言，缺乏公开的基准数据集和有效的方法研究。
AI.method: 构建越南语Text-to-SQL数据集，扩展EditSQL和IRNet模型，测试自动分词、NPMI分数、语法特征及PhoBERT语言模型的影响。
AI.result: 自动分词和NPMI提升解析效果，语法特征增强模型表现，PhoBERT优于XLM-R等多语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 针对越南语的语义解析需结合本地化技术（如PhoBERT）和语法特征优化，低资源语言研究需专用数据集支持。
